authors_text: Mahima Milinda Alwis Weerasinghe,David Parry,Grace Wang,Jacqueline Whalley
title: Ensemble plasticity and network adaptability in SNNs
title_zh: SNN 中的集成可塑性和网络适应性
abstract: Artificial Spiking Neural Networks (ASNNs) promise greater information processing efficiency because of discrete event-based (i.e., spike) computation. Several Machine Learning (ML) applications use biologically inspired plasticity mechanisms as unsupervised learning techniques to increase the robustness of ASNNs while preserving efficiency. Spike Time Dependent Plasticity (STDP) and Intrinsic Plasticity (IP) (i.e., dynamic spiking threshold adaptation) are two such mechanisms that have been combined to form an ensemble learning method. However, it is not clear how this ensemble learning should be regulated based on spiking activity. Moreover, previous studies have attempted threshold based synaptic pruning following STDP, to increase inference efficiency at the cost of performance in ASNNs. However, this type of structural adaptation, that employs individual weight mechanisms, does not consider spiking activity for pruning which is a better representation of input stimuli. We envisaged that plasticity-based spike-regulation and spike-based pruning will result in ASSNs that perform better in low resource situations. In this paper, a novel ensemble learning method based on entropy and network activation is introduced, which is amalgamated with a spike-rate neuron pruning technique, operated exclusively using spiking activity. Two electroencephalography (EEG) datasets are used as the input for classification experiments with a three-layer feed forward ASNN trained using one-pass learning. During the learning process, we observed neurons assembling into a hierarchy of clusters based on spiking rate. It was discovered that pruning lower spike-rate neuron clusters resulted in increased generalization or a predictable decline in performance.

Several Machine Learning (ML) applications use biologically inspired plasticity mechanisms as unsupervised learning techniques to increase the robustness of ASNNs while preserving efficiency. Spike Time Dependent Plasticity (STDP) and Intrinsic Plasticity (IP) (i.e., dynamic spiking threshold adaptation) are two such mechanisms that have been combined to form an ensemble learning method. However, it is not clear how this ensemble learning should be regulated based on spiking activity. Moreover, previous studies have attempted threshold based synaptic pruning following STDP, to increase inference efficiency at the cost of performance in ASNNs. However, this type of structural adaptation, that employs individual weight mechanisms, does not consider spiking activity for pruning which is a better representation of input stimuli. We envisaged that plasticity-based spike-regulation and spike-based pruning will result in ASSNs that perform better in low resource situations. In this paper, a novel ensemble learning method based on entropy and network activation is introduced, which is amalgamated with a spike-rate neuron pruning technique, operated exclusively using spiking activity. Two electroencephalography (EEG) datasets are used as the input for classification experiments with a three-layer feed forward ASNN trained using one-pass learning. During the learning process, we observed neurons assembling into a hierarchy of clusters based on spiking rate. It was discovered that pruning lower spike-rate neuron clusters resulted in increased generalization or a predictable decline in performance.
abstract_zh: 由于基于离散事件（即尖峰）计算，人工尖峰神经网络 (ASNN) 有望提高信息处理效率。一些机器学习 (ML) 应用程序使用受生物学启发的可塑性机制作为无监督学习技术，以提高 ASNN 的鲁棒性，同时保持效率。尖峰时间相关可塑性（STDP）和内在可塑性（IP）（即动态尖峰阈值适应）是两种这样的机制，它们组合在一起形成了集成学习方法。然而，目前尚不清楚如何根据尖峰活动来调节这种集成学习。此外，之前的研究尝试在 STDP 之后进行基于阈值的突触修剪，以牺牲 ASNN 的性能为代价来提高推理效率。然而，这种类型的结构适应采用个体权重机制，没有考虑修剪的尖峰活动，这是输入刺激的更好表示。我们设想基于可塑性的峰值调节和基于峰值的修剪将使 ASSN 在低资源情况下表现更好。在本文中，介绍了一种基于熵和网络激活的新型集成学习方法，该方法与仅使用尖峰活动进行操作的尖峰率神经元修剪技术相结合。两个脑电图 (EEG) 数据集用作分类实验的输入，并使用使用一次性学习训练的三层前馈 ASNN。在学习过程中，我们观察到神经元根据尖峰率组装成簇的层次结构。研究发现，修剪较低尖峰率的神经元簇会导致泛化能力增强或性能出现可预测的下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于熵和网络激活的新型集成学习方法，并结合基于突触速率的神经元剪枝技术，以提升人工脉冲神经网络（ASNN）在低资源环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ASNN的结构适应方法未充分考虑脉冲活动对剪枝的影响，导致效率与性能难以兼顾，需探索基于突触可塑性的脉冲调控与剪枝策略以优化网络适应性。
AI.method: 融合熵值与网络激活分析的集成学习框架，结合仅依赖脉冲活动的突触速率神经元剪枝技术，通过层次化聚类识别低突触速率神经元簇并进行剪枝。
AI.result: 实验表明，剪枝低突触速率神经元簇可提升模型泛化能力或性能可控下降，且在EEG分类任务中验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于脉冲活动调控的可塑性剪枝策略能增强ASNN在低资源场景下的鲁棒性与效率，为未来神经形态计算提供新思路。

Several Machine Learning (ML) applications use biologically inspired plasticity mechanisms as unsupervised learning techniques to increase the robustness of ASNNs while preserving efficiency. However, this type of structural adaptation, that employs individual weight mechanisms, does not consider spiking activity for pruning which is a better representation of input stimuli. authors_text: Hou Pong Chan,Mingxi Guo,Cheng-Zhong Xu
title: Grounding Commands for Autonomous Vehicles via Layer Fusion with Region-specific Dynamic Layer Attention
title_zh: 通过具有特定区域动态层注意力的层融合为自动驾驶车辆提供接地命令
abstract: Grounding a command to the visual environment is an essential ingredient for interactions between autonomous vehicles and humans. In this work, we study the problem of language grounding for autonomous vehicles, which aims to localize a region in a visual scene according to a natural language command from a passenger. Prior work only employs the top layer representations of a vision-and-language pre-trained model to predict the region referred to by the command. However, such a method omits the useful features encoded in other layers, and thus results in inadequate understanding of the input scene and command. To tackle this limitation, we present the first layer fusion approach for this task. Since different visual regions may require distinct types of features to disambiguate them from each other, we further propose the region-specific dynamic (RSD) layer attention to adaptively fuse the multimodal information across layers for each region. Extensive experiments on the Talk2Car benchmark demonstrate that our approach helps predict more accurate regions and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Grounding a command to the visual environment is an essential ingredient for interactions between autonomous vehicles and humans. In this work, we study the problem of language grounding for autonomous vehicles, which aims to localize a region in a visual scene according to a natural language command from a passenger. Prior work only employs the top layer representations of a vision-and-language pre-trained model to predict the region referred to by the command. However, such a method omits the useful features encoded in other layers, and thus results in inadequate understanding of the input scene and command. To tackle this limitation, we present the first layer fusion approach for this task. Since different visual regions may require distinct types of features to disambiguate them from each other, we further propose the region-specific dynamic (RSD) layer attention to adaptively fuse the multimodal information across layers for each region. Extensive experiments on the Talk2Car benchmark demonstrate that our approach helps predict more accurate regions and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 将命令基于视觉环境是自动驾驶车辆与人类之间交互的重要组成部分。在这项工作中，我们研究了自动驾驶汽车的语言基础问题，其目的是根据乘客的自然语言命令定位视觉场景中的区域。先前的工作仅采用视觉和语言预训练模型的顶层表示来预测命令所引用的区域。然而，这种方法忽略了在其他层中编码的有用特征，从而导致对输入场景和命令的理解不充分。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了用于此任务的第一层融合方法。由于不同的视觉区域可能需要不同类型的特征来消除彼此之间的歧义，因此我们进一步提出了区域特定动态（RSD）层注意，以自适应地融合每个区域跨层的多模态信息。 Talk2Car 基准测试的大量实验表明，我们的方法有助于预测更准确的区域，并且性能优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过层融合与区域特定动态层注意力机制，将自动驾驶车辆的自然语言指令定位到视觉场景特定区域的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅使用视觉-语言预训练模型的顶层表示，忽略了其他层的有用特征，导致场景和指令理解不足。
AI.method: 提出首个层融合方法，结合区域特定动态（RSD）层注意力机制，自适应地跨层融合多模态信息以定位指令对应区域。
AI.result: 在Talk2Car基准测试中，该方法预测区域更准确，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态层注意力融合多层特征，有效提升了自动驾驶车辆指令定位的准确性。

authors_text: Seunghun Lee,Wonhyeok Choi,Changjae Kim,Minwoo Choi,Sunghoon Im
title: ADAS: A Direct Adaptation Strategy for Multi-Target Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: ADAS：多目标域自适应语义分割的直接适应策略
abstract: In this paper, we present a direct adaptation strategy (ADAS), which aims to directly adapt a single model to multiple target domains in a semantic segmentation task without pretrained domain-specific models. To do so, we design a multi-target domain transfer network (MTDT-Net) that aligns visual attributes across domains by transferring the domain distinctive features through a new target adaptive denormalization (TAD) module. Moreover, we propose a bi-directional adaptive region selection (BARS) that reduces the attribute ambiguity among the class labels by adaptively selecting the regions with consistent feature statistics. We show that our single MTDT-Net can synthesize visually pleasing domain transferred images with complex driving datasets, and BARS effectively filters out the unnecessary region of training images for each target domain. With the collaboration of MTDT-Net and BARS, our ADAS achieves state-of-the-art performance for multi-target domain adaptation (MTDA). To the best of our knowledge, our method is the first MTDA method that directly adapts to multiple domains in semantic segmentation.
summary: In this paper, we present a direct adaptation strategy (ADAS), which aims to directly adapt a single model to multiple target domains in a semantic segmentation task without pretrained domain-specific models. To do so, we design a multi-target domain transfer network (MTDT-Net) that aligns visual attributes across domains by transferring the domain distinctive features through a new target adaptive denormalization (TAD) module. Moreover, we propose a bi-directional adaptive region selection (BARS) that reduces the attribute ambiguity among the class labels by adaptively selecting the regions with consistent feature statistics. We show that our single MTDT-Net can synthesize visually pleasing domain transferred images with complex driving datasets, and BARS effectively filters out the unnecessary region of training images for each target domain. With the collaboration of MTDT-Net and BARS, our ADAS achieves state-of-the-art performance for multi-target domain adaptation (MTDA). To the best of our knowledge, our method is the first MTDA method that directly adapts to multiple domains in semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种直接适应策略（ADAS），其目的是在语义分割任务中直接将单个模型适应多个目标域，而无需预先训练特定于域的模型。为此，我们设计了一个多目标域传输网络（MTDT-Net），通过新的目标自适应反规范化（TAD）模块传输域独特特征，从而跨域对齐视觉属性。此外，我们提出了一种双向自适应区域选择（BARS），通过自适应选择具有一致特征统计的区域来减少类标签之间的属性模糊性。我们表明，我们的单个 MTDT-Net 可以利用复杂的驾驶数据集合成视觉上令人愉悦的域传输图像，并且 BARS 有效地过滤掉每个目标域的训练图像中不必要的区域。通过 MTDT-Net 和 BARS 的合作，我们的 ADAS 实现了多目标域自适应 (MTDA) 的最先进性能。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个直接适应语义分割中多个领域的 MTDA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种直接适应策略（ADAS），用于在语义分割任务中无需预训练领域特定模型的情况下，将单个模型直接适应到多个目标领域。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法通常需要为每个目标领域单独训练模型，效率低下且难以应对多领域场景。本文旨在开发一种无需预训练模型即可直接适应多目标领域的高效方法。
AI.method: 设计了多目标领域迁移网络（MTDT-Net），通过目标自适应反归一化（TAD）模块对齐跨领域视觉属性，并提出双向自适应区域选择（BARS）模块，通过选择特征统计一致的区域减少类别标签的属性歧义。
AI.result: ADAS在复杂驾驶数据集上实现了视觉效果良好的领域迁移图像合成，BARS有效过滤了每个目标领域的训练图像冗余区域，整体方法在多目标领域自适应任务中达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: ADAS是首个直接适应多领域语义分割的多目标领域自适应方法，通过MTDT-Net与BARS的协同作用，实现了高效且性能优越的跨领域模型迁移。

search_text: ADAS: A Direct Adaptation Strategy for Multi-Target Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation ADAS：多目标域自适应语义分割的直接适应策略 In this paper, we present a direct adaptation strategy (ADAS), which aims to directly adapt a single model to multiple target domains in a semantic segmentation task without pretrained domain-specific models. To do so, we design a multi-target domain transfer network (MTDT-Net) that aligns visual attributes across domains by transferring the domain distinctive features through a new target adaptive denormalization (TAD) module. Moreover, we propose a bi-directional adaptive region selection (BARS) that reduces the attribute ambiguity among the class labels by adaptively selecting the regions with consistent feature statistics. We show that our single MTDT-Net can synthesize visually pleasing domain transferred images with complex driving datasets, and BARS effectively filters out the unnecessary region of training images for each target domain. With the collaboration of MTDT-Net and BARS, our ADAS achieves state-of-the-art performance for multi-target domain adaptation (MTDA). To the best of our knowledge, our method is the first MTDA method that directly adapts to multiple domains in semantic segmentation. 在本文中，我们提出了一种直接适应策略（ADAS），其目的是在语义分割任务中直接将单个模型适应多个目标域，而无需预先训练特定于域的模型。为此，我们设计了一个多目标域传输网络（MTDT-Net），通过新的目标自适应反规范化（TAD）模块传输域独特特征，从而跨域对齐视觉属性。此外，我们提出了一种双向自适应区域选择（BARS），通过自适应选择具有一致特征统计的区域来减少类标签之间的属性模糊性。我们表明，我们的单个 MTDT-Net 可以利用复杂的驾驶数据集合成视觉上令人愉悦的域传输图像，并且 BARS 有效地过滤掉每个目标域的训练图像中不必要的区域。通过 MTDT-Net 和 BARS 的合作，我们的 ADAS 实现了多目标域自适应 (MTDA) 的最先进性能。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个直接适应语义分割中多个领域的 MTDA 方法。 本文提出了一种直接适应策略（ADAS），用于在语义分割任务中无需预训练领域特定模型的情况下，将单个模型直接适应到多个目标领域。 Seunghun Lee,Wonhyeok Choi,Changjae Kim,Minwoo Choi,Sunghoon Im cs.CV

authors_text: Xin Fan,Zi Li,Ziyang Li,Xiaolin Wang,Risheng Liu,Zhongxuan Luo,Hao Huang
title: Automated Learning for Deformable Medical Image Registration by Jointly Optimizing Network Architectures and Objective Functions
title_zh: 通过联合优化网络架构和目标函数实现可变形医学图像配准的自动学习
abstract: Deformable image registration plays a critical role in various tasks of medical image analysis. A successful registration algorithm, either derived from conventional energy optimization or deep networks requires tremendous efforts from computer experts to well design registration energy or to carefully tune network architectures for the specific type of medical data. To tackle the aforementioned problems, this paper proposes an automated learning registration algorithm (AutoReg) that cooperatively optimizes both architectures and their corresponding training objectives, enabling non-computer experts, e.g., medical/clinical users, to conveniently find off-the-shelf registration algorithms for diverse scenarios. Specifically, we establish a triple-level framework to deduce registration network architectures and objectives with an auto-searching mechanism and cooperating optimization. We conduct image registration experiments on multi-site volume datasets and various registration tasks. Extensive results demonstrate that our AutoReg may automatically learn an optimal deep registration network for given volumes and achieve state-of-the-art performance, also significantly improving computation efficiency than the mainstream UNet architectures (from 0.558 to 0.270 seconds for a 3D image pair on the same configuration).
summary: Deformable image registration plays a critical role in various tasks of medical image analysis. A successful registration algorithm, either derived from conventional energy optimization or deep networks requires tremendous efforts from computer experts to well design registration energy or to carefully tune network architectures for the specific type of medical data. To tackle the aforementioned problems, this paper proposes an automated learning registration algorithm (AutoReg) that cooperatively optimizes both architectures and their corresponding training objectives, enabling non-computer experts, e.g., medical/clinical users, to conveniently find off-the-shelf registration algorithms for diverse scenarios. Specifically, we establish a triple-level framework to deduce registration network architectures and objectives with an auto-searching mechanism and cooperating optimization. We conduct image registration experiments on multi-site volume datasets and various registration tasks. Extensive results demonstrate that our AutoReg may automatically learn an optimal deep registration network for given volumes and achieve state-of-the-art performance, also significantly improving computation efficiency than the mainstream UNet architectures (from 0.558 to 0.270 seconds for a 3D image pair on the same configuration).
abstract_zh: 变形图像配准在医学图像分析的各种任务中起着至关重要的作用。成功的配准算法，无论是源自传统的能量优化还是深度网络，都需要计算机专家付出巨大的努力来精心设计配准能量或针对特定类型的医疗数据仔细调整网络架构。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种自动学习配准算法（AutoReg），它可以协同优化两种架构及其相应的训练目标，使非计算机专家（例如医学/临床用户）能够方便地找到适用于不同场景的现成配准算法。具体来说，我们建立了一个三级框架，通过自动搜索机制和协作优化来推导注册网络架构和目标。我们对多站点体积数据集和各种配准任务进行图像配准实验。大量结果表明，我们的 AutoReg 可以自动学习给定体积的最佳深度配准网络，并实现最先进的性能，还比主流 UNet 架构显着提高计算效率（相同配置下的 3D 图像对从 0.558 秒到 0.270 秒）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动学习的可变形医学图像配准算法AutoReg，通过联合优化网络架构和目标函数，使非计算机专家能够方便地为不同场景找到现成的配准算法。
AI.motivation: 传统配准方法需要计算机专家耗费大量精力设计能量函数或调整网络架构，而医学临床用户缺乏此类技术能力，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 建立三级框架，通过自动搜索机制和协同优化，联合推导配准网络架构与目标函数，实现架构与训练目标的协同进化。
AI.result: 在多站点体积数据集上实验表明，AutoReg能自动学习最优深度配准网络，在保持最先进性能的同时，将3D图像对配准计算效率提升至UNet主流架构的0.270秒（原0.558秒）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统配准算法依赖专家经验的局限，为医学临床用户提供了一种高效、自动化的配准解决方案，显著提升了计算效率与适用性。

authors_text: Qinghua Liu,Yuanhao Wang,Chi Jin
title: Learning Markov Games with Adversarial Opponents: Efficient Algorithms and Fundamental Limits
title_zh: 与对抗性对手学习马尔可夫博弈：高效算法和基本限制
comment: fix typos and add additional reference
comments: fix typos and add additional reference
abstract: An ideal strategy in zero-sum games should not only grant the player an average reward no less than the value of Nash equilibrium, but also exploit the (adaptive) opponents when they are suboptimal. While most existing works in Markov games focus exclusively on the former objective, it remains open whether we can achieve both objectives simultaneously. To address this problem, this work studies no-regret learning in Markov games with adversarial opponents when competing against the best fixed policy in hindsight. Along this direction, we present a new complete set of positive and negative results: When the policies of the opponents are revealed at the end of each episode, we propose new efficient algorithms achieving $\sqrt{K}$-regret bounds when either (1) the baseline policy class is small or (2) the opponent's policy class is small. This is complemented with an exponential lower bound when neither conditions are true. When the policies of the opponents are not revealed, we prove a statistical hardness result even in the most favorable scenario when both above conditions are true. Our hardness result is much stronger than the existing hardness results which either only involve computational hardness, or require further restrictions on the algorithms.
summary: An ideal strategy in zero-sum games should not only grant the player an average reward no less than the value of Nash equilibrium, but also exploit the (adaptive) opponents when they are suboptimal. While most existing works in Markov games focus exclusively on the former objective, it remains open whether we can achieve both objectives simultaneously. To address this problem, this work studies no-regret learning in Markov games with adversarial opponents when competing against the best fixed policy in hindsight. Along this direction, we present a new complete set of positive and negative results: When the policies of the opponents are revealed at the end of each episode, we propose new efficient algorithms achieving $\sqrt{K}$-regret bounds when either (1) the baseline policy class is small or (2) the opponent's policy class is small. This is complemented with an exponential lower bound when neither conditions are true. When the policies of the opponents are not revealed, we prove a statistical hardness result even in the most favorable scenario when both above conditions are true. Our hardness result is much stronger than the existing hardness results which either only involve computational hardness, or require further restrictions on the algorithms.
abstract_zh: 零和博弈中的理想策略不仅应该给予玩家不低于纳什均衡值的平均奖励，而且还应该在（自适应）对手次优时利用他们。虽然马尔可夫博弈中的大多数现有工作都只关注前一个目标，但我们是否可以同时实现这两个目标仍然存在疑问。为了解决这个问题，这项工作研究了在与事后最佳固定策略竞争时与对手的马尔可夫博弈中的无悔学习。沿着这个方向，我们提出了一套新的完整的正面和负面结果：当对手的策略在每集结束时被揭示时，我们提出新的有效算法，当（1）基线策略类较小或（2）对手的策略类较小时实现 $\sqrt{K}$-regret 边界。当这两个条件都不成立时，这是用指数下限来补充的。当对手的政策没有被揭露时，即使在上述两个条件都成立的最有利的情况下，我们也证明了统计硬度结果。我们的硬度结果比现有的硬度结果强得多，现有的硬度结果要么只涉及计算硬度，要么需要对算法进行进一步的限制。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在对抗性对手的马尔可夫博弈中实现无遗憾学习的算法及理论限制。
AI.motivation: 现有马尔可夫博弈研究多关注保证纳什均衡收益，但能否同时利用次优对手尚不明确。本文旨在解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出两种条件下的高效算法：当对手策略在回合末可知时，若基线策略集或对手策略集较小时，算法达到√K遗憾界；并证明当两者均不满足时存在指数级下界。同时证明策略不可知时的统计困难性。
AI.result: 提出满足特定条件的√K遗憾算法，证明策略不可知场景下的统计硬度，且结果比现有计算复杂度结果更强。
AI.conclusion: 本文为对抗性马尔可夫博弈的无遗憾学习提供了完整的正反结果，揭示了高效算法的理论边界。

search_text: Learning Markov Games with Adversarial Opponents: Efficient Algorithms and Fundamental Limits 与对抗性对手学习马尔可夫博弈：高效算法和基本限制 An ideal strategy in zero-sum games should not only grant the player an average reward no less than the value of Nash equilibrium, but also exploit the (adaptive) opponents when they are suboptimal. While most existing works in Markov games focus exclusively on the former objective, it remains open whether we can achieve both objectives simultaneously. To address this problem, this work studies no-regret learning in Markov games with adversarial opponents when competing against the best fixed policy in hindsight. Along this direction, we present a new complete set of positive and negative results: When the policies of the opponents are revealed at the end of each episode, we propose new efficient algorithms achieving $\sqrt{K}$-regret bounds when either (1) the baseline policy class is small or (2) the opponent's policy class is small. This is complemented with an exponential lower bound when neither conditions are true. When the policies of the opponents are not revealed, we prove a statistical hardness result even in the most favorable scenario when both above conditions are true. Our hardness result is much stronger than the existing hardness results which either only involve computational hardness, or require further restrictions on the algorithms. 零和博弈中的理想策略不仅应该给予玩家不低于纳什均衡值的平均奖励，而且还应该在（自适应）对手次优时利用他们。虽然马尔可夫博弈中的大多数现有工作都只关注前一个目标，但我们是否可以同时实现这两个目标仍然存在疑问。为了解决这个问题，这项工作研究了在与事后最佳固定策略竞争时与对手的马尔可夫博弈中的无悔学习。沿着这个方向，我们提出了一套新的完整的正面和负面结果：当对手的策略在每集结束时被揭示时，我们提出新的有效算法，当（1）基线策略类较小或（2）对手的策略类较小时实现 $\sqrt{K}$-regret 边界。当这两个条件都不成立时，这是用指数下限来补充的。当对手的政策没有被揭露时，即使在上述两个条件都成立的最有利的情况下，我们也证明了统计硬度结果。我们的硬度结果比现有的硬度结果强得多，现有的硬度结果要么只涉及计算硬度，要么需要对算法进行进一步的限制。 本文研究在对抗性对手的马尔可夫博弈中实现无遗憾学习的算法及理论限制。 Qinghua Liu,Yuanhao Wang,Chi Jin cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Xinhua Zhang,Lance R. Williams
title: Euclidean Invariant Recognition of 2D Shapes Using Histograms of Magnitudes of Local Fourier-Mellin Descriptors
title_zh: 使用局部傅里叶梅林描述符的幅度直方图对 2D 形状进行欧几里德不变识别
abstract: Because the magnitude of inner products with its basis functions are invariant to rotation and scale change, the Fourier-Mellin transform has long been used as a component in Euclidean invariant 2D shape recognition systems. Yet Fourier-Mellin transform magnitudes are only invariant to rotation and scale changes about a known center point, and full Euclidean invariant shape recognition is not possible except when this center point can be consistently and accurately identified. In this paper, we describe a system where a Fourier-Mellin transform is computed at every point in the image. The spatial support of the Fourier-Mellin basis functions is made local by multiplying them with a polynomial envelope. Significantly, the magnitudes of convolutions with these complex filters at isolated points are not (by themselves) used as features for Euclidean invariant shape recognition because reliable discrimination would require filters with spatial support large enough to fully encompass the shapes. Instead, we rely on the fact that normalized histograms of magnitudes are fully Euclidean invariant. We demonstrate a system based on the VLAD machine learning method that performs Euclidean invariant recognition of 2D shapes and requires an order of magnitude less training data than comparable methods based on convolutional neural networks.
summary: Because the magnitude of inner products with its basis functions are invariant to rotation and scale change, the Fourier-Mellin transform has long been used as a component in Euclidean invariant 2D shape recognition systems. Yet Fourier-Mellin transform magnitudes are only invariant to rotation and scale changes about a known center point, and full Euclidean invariant shape recognition is not possible except when this center point can be consistently and accurately identified. In this paper, we describe a system where a Fourier-Mellin transform is computed at every point in the image. The spatial support of the Fourier-Mellin basis functions is made local by multiplying them with a polynomial envelope. Significantly, the magnitudes of convolutions with these complex filters at isolated points are not (by themselves) used as features for Euclidean invariant shape recognition because reliable discrimination would require filters with spatial support large enough to fully encompass the shapes. Instead, we rely on the fact that normalized histograms of magnitudes are fully Euclidean invariant. We demonstrate a system based on the VLAD machine learning method that performs Euclidean invariant recognition of 2D shapes and requires an order of magnitude less training data than comparable methods based on convolutional neural networks.
abstract_zh: 由于内积的大小及其基函数对于旋转和尺度变化是不变的，因此傅里叶-梅林变换长期以来一直被用作欧几里德不变二维形状识别系统的组成部分。然而，傅里叶-梅林变换幅度仅对已知中心点的旋转和缩放变化保持不变，并且除非可以一致且准确地识别该中心点，否则完全欧几里得不变形状识别是不可能的。在本文中，我们描述了一个在图像中的每个点计算傅里叶-梅林变换的系统。傅里叶梅林基函数的空间支持通过将其与多项式包络相乘而成为局部的。值得注意的是，这些复杂滤波器在孤立点处的卷积大小（本身）不用作欧几里德不变形状识别的特征，因为可靠的区分需要具有足够大的空间支持以完全包含形状的滤波器。相反，我们依赖于这样一个事实：标准化的幅值直方图是完全欧几里得不变的。我们演示了一个基于 VLAD 机器学习方法的系统，该系统执行 2D 形状的欧几里德不变识别，并且需要的训练数据比基于卷积神经网络的同类方法少一个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部傅里叶-梅林描述子幅度直方图的二维形状欧几里得不变识别方法。
AI.motivation: 传统傅里叶-梅林变换需依赖已知中心点实现旋转和尺度不变性，难以应对中心点不一致或无法准确识别的情况。
AI.method: 在图像每个点计算傅里叶-梅林变换，通过多项式包络实现局部基函数空间支持；利用归一化幅度直方图的欧几里得不变性，结合VLAD机器学习方法进行形状识别。
AI.result: 系统在无需依赖固定中心点的情况下实现完全欧几里得不变识别，训练数据量较卷积神经网络方法减少一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部傅里叶-梅林描述子幅度直方图，提出了一种高效且数据需求更低的二维形状欧几里得不变识别方案。

search_text: Euclidean Invariant Recognition of 2D Shapes Using Histograms of Magnitudes of Local Fourier-Mellin Descriptors 使用局部傅里叶梅林描述符的幅度直方图对 2D 形状进行欧几里德不变识别 Because the magnitude of inner products with its basis functions are invariant to rotation and scale change, the Fourier-Mellin transform has long been used as a component in Euclidean invariant 2D shape recognition systems. Instead, we rely on the fact that normalized histograms of magnitudes are fully Euclidean invariant. Williams cs.CV

authors_text: Xinhua Zhang,Lance R. Williams
title: Similarity Equivariant Linear Transformation of Joint Orientation-Scale Space Representations
title_zh: 联合方向尺度空间表示的相似等变线性变换
abstract: Convolution is conventionally defined as a linear operation on functions of one or more variables which commutes with shifts. Group convolution generalizes the concept to linear operations on functions of group elements representing more general geometric transformations and which commute with those transformations. Since similarity transformation is the most general geometric transformation on images that preserves shape, the group convolution that is equivariant to similarity transformation is the most general shape preserving linear operator. Because similarity transformations have four free parameters, group convolutions are defined on four-dimensional, joint orientation-scale spaces. Although prior work on equivariant linear operators has been limited to discrete groups, the similarity group is continuous. In this paper, we describe linear operators on discrete representations that are equivariant to continuous similarity transformation. This is achieved by using a basis of functions that is it joint shiftable-twistable-scalable. These pinwheel functions use Fourier series in the orientation dimension and Laplace transform in the log-scale dimension to form a basis of spatially localized functions that can be continuously interpolated in position, orientation and scale. Although this result is potentially significant with respect to visual computation generally, we present an initial demonstration of its utility by using it to compute a shape equivariant distribution of closed contours traced by particles undergoing Brownian motion in velocity. The contours are constrained by sets of points and line endings representing well known bistable illusory contour inducing patterns.
summary: Convolution is conventionally defined as a linear operation on functions of one or more variables which commutes with shifts. Group convolution generalizes the concept to linear operations on functions of group elements representing more general geometric transformations and which commute with those transformations. Since similarity transformation is the most general geometric transformation on images that preserves shape, the group convolution that is equivariant to similarity transformation is the most general shape preserving linear operator. Because similarity transformations have four free parameters, group convolutions are defined on four-dimensional, joint orientation-scale spaces. Although prior work on equivariant linear operators has been limited to discrete groups, the similarity group is continuous. In this paper, we describe linear operators on discrete representations that are equivariant to continuous similarity transformation. This is achieved by using a basis of functions that is it joint shiftable-twistable-scalable. These pinwheel functions use Fourier series in the orientation dimension and Laplace transform in the log-scale dimension to form a basis of spatially localized functions that can be continuously interpolated in position, orientation and scale. Although this result is potentially significant with respect to visual computation generally, we present an initial demonstration of its utility by using it to compute a shape equivariant distribution of closed contours traced by particles undergoing Brownian motion in velocity. The contours are constrained by sets of points and line endings representing well known bistable illusory contour inducing patterns.
abstract_zh: 卷积通常被定义为对一个或多个变量的函数进行的线性运算，这些变量通过移位进行交换。群卷积将这一概念推广到群元素函数的线性运算，这些群元素代表更一般的几何变换，并且与这些变换进行交换。由于相似变换是图像上最通用的保持形状的几何变换，因此与相似变换等变的组卷积是最通用的形状保持线性算子。由于相似变换有四个自由参数，因此组卷积是在四维联合方向尺度空间上定义的。尽管等变线性算子的先前工作仅限于离散组，但相似组是连续的。在本文中，我们描述了与连续相似变换等变的离散表示的线性算子。这是通过使用可移动-可扭转-可伸缩联合的功能基础来实现的。这些风车函数在方向维度中使用傅里叶级数，在对数尺度维度中使用拉普拉斯变换，形成空间局部化函数的基础，可以在位置、方向和尺度上连续插值。尽管这个结果对于视觉计算来说可能具有重要意义，但我们通过使用它来计算由速度中经历布朗运动的粒子追踪的闭合轮廓的形状等变分布来初步演示其实用性。轮廓受到代表众所周知的双稳态虚幻轮廓诱导图案的点集和线末端的约束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在联合方向-尺度空间表示上实现相似性等变线性变换的方法，以处理图像中保持形状的连续几何变换。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积操作仅适用于平移等离散变换，而相似性变换（包含旋转、缩放等连续参数）是图像中最通用的保形变换，需设计对应的连续等变线性算子。
AI.method: 构建联合可移位-可扭曲-可缩放的基函数，通过傅里叶级数处理方向维度，拉普拉斯变换处理对数尺度维度，形成可连续插值的空间局部化函数基。
AI.result: 利用该方法计算了布朗运动粒子生成的闭合轮廓的形状等变分布，验证了其在处理双稳态错觉轮廓模式中的有效性。

search_text: Similarity Equivariant Linear Transformation of Joint Orientation-Scale Space Representations 联合方向尺度空间表示的相似等变线性变换 Convolution is conventionally defined as a linear operation on functions of one or more variables which commutes with shifts. Group convolution generalizes the concept to linear operations on functions of group elements representing more general geometric transformations and which commute with those transformations. Since similarity transformation is the most general geometric transformation on images that preserves shape, the group convolution that is equivariant to similarity transformation is the most general shape preserving linear operator. Because similarity transformations have four free parameters, group convolutions are defined on four-dimensional, joint orientation-scale spaces. Although prior work on equivariant linear operators has been limited to discrete groups, the similarity group is continuous. In this paper, we describe linear operators on discrete representations that are equivariant to continuous similarity transformation. This is achieved by using a basis of functions that is it joint shiftable-twistable-scalable. These pinwheel functions use Fourier series in the orientation dimension and Laplace transform in the log-scale dimension to form a basis of spatially localized functions that can be continuously interpolated in position, orientation and scale. Although this result is potentially significant with respect to visual computation generally, we present an initial demonstration of its utility by using it to compute a shape equivariant distribution of closed contours traced by particles undergoing Brownian motion in velocity. The contours are constrained by sets of points and line endings representing well known bistable illusory contour inducing patterns. 卷积通常被定义为对一个或多个变量的函数进行的线性运算，这些变量通过移位进行交换。群卷积将这一概念推广到群元素函数的线性运算，这些群元素代表更一般的几何变换，并且与这些变换进行交换。由于相似变换是图像上最通用的保持形状的几何变换，因此与相似变换等变的组卷积是最通用的形状保持线性算子。由于相似变换有四个自由参数，因此组卷积是在四维联合方向尺度空间上定义的。尽管等变线性算子的先前工作仅限于离散组，但相似组是连续的。在本文中，我们描述了与连续相似变换等变的离散表示的线性算子。这是通过使用可移动-可扭转-可伸缩联合的功能基础来实现的。这些风车函数在方向维度中使用傅里叶级数，在对数尺度维度中使用拉普拉斯变换，形成空间局部化函数的基础，可以在位置、方向和尺度上连续插值。尽管这个结果对于视觉计算来说可能具有重要意义，但我们通过使用它来计算由速度中经历布朗运动的粒子追踪的闭合轮廓的形状等变分布来初步演示其实用性。轮廓受到代表众所周知的双稳态虚幻轮廓诱导图案的点集和线末端的约束。 本文提出了一种在联合方向-尺度空间表示上实现相似性等变线性变换的方法，以处理图像中保持形状的连续几何变换。 Xinhua Zhang,Lance R. Williams cs.CV

authors_text: Rel Guzman,Rafael Oliveira,Fabio Ramos
title: Adaptive Model Predictive Control by Learning Classifiers
title_zh: 通过学习分类器进行自适应模型预测控制
comment: To appear in the 4th Annual Learning for Dynamics & Control Conference (L4DC) 2022
comments: To appear in the 4th Annual Learning for Dynamics & Control Conference (L4DC) 2022
abstract: Stochastic model predictive control has been a successful and robust control framework for many robotics tasks where the system dynamics model is slightly inaccurate or in the presence of environment disturbances. Despite the successes, it is still unclear how to best adjust control parameters to the current task in the presence of model parameter uncertainty and heteroscedastic noise. In this paper, we propose an adaptive MPC variant that automatically estimates control and model parameters by leveraging ideas from Bayesian optimisation (BO) and the classical expected improvement acquisition function. We leverage recent results showing that BO can be reformulated via density ratio estimation, which can be efficiently approximated by simply learning a classifier. This is then integrated into a model predictive path integral control framework yielding robust controllers for a variety of challenging robotics tasks. We demonstrate the approach on classical control problems under model uncertainty and robotics manipulation tasks.
summary: Stochastic model predictive control has been a successful and robust control framework for many robotics tasks where the system dynamics model is slightly inaccurate or in the presence of environment disturbances. Despite the successes, it is still unclear how to best adjust control parameters to the current task in the presence of model parameter uncertainty and heteroscedastic noise. In this paper, we propose an adaptive MPC variant that automatically estimates control and model parameters by leveraging ideas from Bayesian optimisation (BO) and the classical expected improvement acquisition function. We leverage recent results showing that BO can be reformulated via density ratio estimation, which can be efficiently approximated by simply learning a classifier. This is then integrated into a model predictive path integral control framework yielding robust controllers for a variety of challenging robotics tasks. We demonstrate the approach on classical control problems under model uncertainty and robotics manipulation tasks.
abstract_zh: 随机模型预测控制对于许多机器人任务来说是一种成功且稳健的控制框架，其中系统动力学模型稍微不准确或存在环境干扰。尽管取得了成功，但在存在模型参数不确定性和异方差噪声的情况下，仍然不清楚如何最好地调整控制参数以适应当前任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种自适应 MPC 变体，它利用贝叶斯优化 (BO) 和经典预期改进获取函数的思想自动估计控制和模型参数。我们利用最近的结果表明，BO 可以通过密度比估计重新表述，通过简单地学习分类器就可以有效地近似。然后将其集成到模型预测路径积分控制框架中，为各种具有挑战性的机器人任务提供强大的控制器。我们展示了模型不确定性和机器人操作任务下经典控制问题的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于分类器学习的自适应模型预测控制方法，以处理模型不确定性和异方差噪声下的控制参数调整问题。
AI.motivation: 现有随机模型预测控制在模型参数不确定和异方差噪声环境下，缺乏有效调整控制参数的策略，导致控制性能下降。
AI.method: 结合贝叶斯优化与密度比估计理论，通过训练分类器近似参数估计，集成至模型预测路径积分控制框架实现自适应控制。
AI.result: 在经典控制问题和机器人操作任务中验证了方法有效性，展示了对模型不确定性及噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分类器驱动的参数估计机制，为复杂动态环境下的自适应控制提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Animesh Basak Chowdhury,Anushree Mahapatra,Deepraj Soni,Ramesh Karri
title: Fuzzing+Hardware Performance Counters-Based Detection of Algorithm Subversion Attacks on Post-Quantum Signature Schemes
title_zh: 基于模糊测试+硬件性能计数器的后量子签名方案算法颠覆攻击检测
comment: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
comments: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: NIST is standardizing Post Quantum Cryptography (PQC) algorithms that are resilient to the computational capability of quantum computers. Past works show malicious subversion with cryptographic software (algorithm subversion attacks) that weaken the implementations. We show that PQC digital signature codes can be subverted in line with previously reported flawed implementations that generate verifiable, but less-secure signatures, demonstrating the risk of such attacks. Since, all processors have built-in Hardware Performance Counters (HPCs), there exists a body of work proposing a low-cost Machine Learning (ML)-based integrity checking of software using HPC fingerprints. However, such HPC-based approaches may not detect subversion of PQC codes. A miniscule percentage of qualitative inputs when applied to the PQC codes improve this accuracy to 98%. We propose grey-box fuzzing as a pre-processing step to obtain inputs to aid the HPC-based method.
summary: NIST is standardizing Post Quantum Cryptography (PQC) algorithms that are resilient to the computational capability of quantum computers. Past works show malicious subversion with cryptographic software (algorithm subversion attacks) that weaken the implementations. We show that PQC digital signature codes can be subverted in line with previously reported flawed implementations that generate verifiable, but less-secure signatures, demonstrating the risk of such attacks. Since, all processors have built-in Hardware Performance Counters (HPCs), there exists a body of work proposing a low-cost Machine Learning (ML)-based integrity checking of software using HPC fingerprints. However, such HPC-based approaches may not detect subversion of PQC codes. A miniscule percentage of qualitative inputs when applied to the PQC codes improve this accuracy to 98%. We propose grey-box fuzzing as a pre-processing step to obtain inputs to aid the HPC-based method.
abstract_zh: NIST 正在标准化后量子密码 (PQC) 算法，这些算法能够适应量子计算机的计算能力。过去的工作显示了使用加密软件进行的恶意颠覆（算法颠覆攻击），从而削弱了实现。我们证明，PQC 数字签名代码可以根据之前报告的有缺陷的实现来破坏，这些实现会生成可验证但安全性较低的签名，这表明了此类攻击的风险。由于所有处理器都内置硬件性能计数器 (HPC)，因此存在大量工作建议使用 HPC 指纹对基于机器学习 (ML) 的软件进行低成本完整性检查。然而，这种基于 HPC 的方法可能无法检测 PQC 代码的破坏。当应用于 PQC 代码时，极少量的定性输入可将准确性提高至 98%。我们建议将灰盒模糊测试作为预处理步骤，以获得输入来辅助基于 HPC 的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合模糊测试与硬件性能计数器（HPC）的方法，检测后量子密码签名方案中的算法篡改攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有基于HPC的机器学习方法难以有效检测后量子密码（PQC）代码的算法篡改攻击，而此类攻击可能削弱PQC实现的安全性。
AI.method: 通过灰盒模糊测试生成优化输入，结合HPC指纹特征进行机器学习分类，提升检测准确性。
AI.result: 在少量高质量输入下，检测准确率提升至98%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效增强PQC算法篡改攻击的检测能力，为保障后量子密码实现安全性提供新思路。

However, such HPC-based approaches may not detect subversion of PQC codes. A miniscule percentage of qualitative inputs when applied to the PQC codes improve this accuracy to 98%. NIST 正在标准化后量子密码 (PQC) 算法，这些算法能够适应量子计算机的计算能力。过去的工作显示了使用加密软件进行的恶意颠覆（算法颠覆攻击），从而削弱了实现。我们证明，PQC 数字签名代码可以根据之前报告的有缺陷的实现来破坏，这些实现会生成可验证但安全性较低的签名，这表明了此类攻击的风险。由于所有处理器都内置硬件性能计数器 (HPC)，因此存在大量工作建议使用 HPC 指纹对基于机器学习 (ML) 的软件进行低成本完整性检查。然而，这种基于 HPC 的方法可能无法检测 PQC 代码的破坏。当应用于 PQC 代码时，极少量的定性输入可将准确性提高至 98%。我们建议将灰盒模糊测试作为预处理步骤，以获得输入来辅助基于 HPC 的方法。 本文提出结合模糊测试与硬件性能计数器（HPC）的方法，检测后量子密码签名方案中的算法篡改攻击。 Animesh Basak Chowdhury,Anushree Mahapatra,Deepraj Soni,Ramesh Karri cs.CR,cs.ET,cs.SE

authors_text: Sun-Yuan Hsieh,Hoang-Oanh Le,Van Bang Le,Sheng-Lung Peng
title: On the $d$-Claw Vertex Deletion Problem
title_zh: 关于$d$-Claw 顶点删除问题
abstract: Let $d$-claw (or $d$-star) stand for $K_{1,d}$, the complete bipartite graph with 1 and $d\ge 1$ vertices on each part. The $d$-claw vertex deletion problem, $d$-CLAW-VD, asks for a given graph $G$ and an integer $k$ if one can delete at most $k$ vertices from $G$ such that the resulting graph has no $d$-claw as an induced subgraph. Thus, 1-CLAW-VD and 2-CLAW-VD are just the famous VERTEX COVER problem and the CLUSTER VERTEX DELETION problem, respectively. In this paper, we strengthen a hardness result in [M. Yannakakis, Node-Deletion Problems on Bipartite Graphs, SIAM J. Comput. (1981)], by showing that CLUSTER VERTEX DELETION remains NP-complete when restricted to bipartite graphs of maximum degree 3. Moreover, for every $d\ge 3$, we show that $d$-CLAW-VD is NP-complete even when restricted to bipartite graphs of maximum degree $d$. These hardness results are optimal with respect to degree constraint. By extending the hardness result in [F. Bonomo-Braberman et al., Linear-Time Algorithms for Eliminating Claws in Graphs, COCOON 2020], we show that, for every $d\ge 3$, $d$-CLAW-VD is NP-complete even when restricted to split graphs without $(d+1)$-claws, and split graphs of diameter 2. On the positive side, we prove that $d$-CLAW-VD is polynomially solvable on what we call $d$-block graphs, a class properly contains all block graphs. This result extends the polynomial-time algorithm in [Y. Cao et al., Vertex deletion problems on chordal graphs, Theor. Comput. Sci. (2018)] for 2-CLAW-VD on block graphs to $d$-CLAW-VD for all $d\ge 2$ and improves the polynomial-time algorithm proposed by F. Bonomo-Brabeman et al. for (unweighted) 3-CLAW-VD on block graphs to 3-block graphs.

The $d$-claw vertex deletion problem, $d$-CLAW-VD, asks for a given graph $G$ and an integer $k$ if one can delete at most $k$ vertices from $G$ such that the resulting graph has no $d$-claw as an induced subgraph. Thus, 1-CLAW-VD and 2-CLAW-VD are just the famous VERTEX COVER problem and the CLUSTER VERTEX DELETION problem, respectively. In this paper, we strengthen a hardness result in [M. Yannakakis, Node-Deletion Problems on Bipartite Graphs, SIAM J. Comput. (1981)], by showing that CLUSTER VERTEX DELETION remains NP-complete when restricted to bipartite graphs of maximum degree 3. Moreover, for every $d\ge 3$, we show that $d$-CLAW-VD is NP-complete even when restricted to bipartite graphs of maximum degree $d$. These hardness results are optimal with respect to degree constraint. By extending the hardness result in [F. Bonomo-Braberman et al., Linear-Time Algorithms for Eliminating Claws in Graphs, COCOON 2020], we show that, for every $d\ge 3$, $d$-CLAW-VD is NP-complete even when restricted to split graphs without $(d+1)$-claws, and split graphs of diameter 2. On the positive side, we prove that $d$-CLAW-VD is polynomially solvable on what we call $d$-block graphs, a class properly contains all block graphs. This result extends the polynomial-time algorithm in [Y. Cao et al., Vertex deletion problems on chordal graphs, Theor. Comput. Sci. (2018)] for 2-CLAW-VD on block graphs to $d$-CLAW-VD for all $d\ge 2$ and improves the polynomial-time algorithm proposed by F. Bonomo-Brabeman et al. for (unweighted) 3-CLAW-VD on block graphs to 3-block graphs.
abstract_zh: 让$d$-claw（或$d$-star）代表$K_{1,d}$，即每个部分有1个和$d\ge 1$个顶点的完整二分图。 $d$-claw 顶点删除问题 $d$-CLAW-VD，要求给定图 $G$ 和整数 $k$，前提是可以从 $G$ 中删除最多 $k$ 个顶点，使得生成的图没有 $d$-claw 作为导出子图。因此，1-CLAW-VD和2-CLAW-VD分别是著名的顶点覆盖问题和簇顶点删除问题。在本文中，我们强化了[M. Yannakakis，二分图上的节点删除问题，SIAM J. Comput。 (1981)]，通过证明当限制到最大度数为 3 的二分图时，簇顶点删除仍然是 NP 完全的。此外，对于每个 $d\ge 3$，我们表明即使限制到最大度数 $d$ 的二分图，$d$-CLAW-VD 也是 NP 完全的。这些硬度结果在度数约束方面是最佳的。通过扩展硬度，结果为[F. Bonomo-Braberman 等人，消除图中爪子的线性时间算法，COCOON 2020]，我们证明，对于每个 $d\ge 3$，即使限制为没有 $(d+1)$-爪子的分割图和直径为 2 的分割图，$d$-CLAW-VD 也是 NP 完全的。从积极的一面来看，我们证明 $d$-CLAW-VD 是在我们所说的 $d$ 块图上多项式可解，一个类正确地包含所有块图。该结果扩展了[Y. Cao 等人，弦图上的顶点删除问题，理论。计算。科学。 (2018)] 将块图上的 2-CLAW-VD 转换为所有 $d\ge 2$ 的 $d$-CLAW-VD，并改进了 F. Bonomo-Brabeman 等人提出的多项式时间算法。对于（未加权）3-CLAW-VD，将块图转换为 3 块图。

AI.tldr: 研究d-爪顶点删除问题（d-CLAW-VD）的计算复杂性，包括在不同图类上的NP完全性证明和多项式时间算法。
AI.motivation: 推广和加强已知的硬度结果，并寻找d-CLAW-VD在特殊图类上的可解情况，填补对d≥3时该问题的复杂性认识空白。
AI.method: 通过归约和扩展已有硬度结果（如Yannakakis和Bonomo-Braberman等人的工作），证明d-CLAW-VD在二分图最大度约束和分裂图上的NP完全性；同时设计多项式时间算法求解d-block图上的该问题。
AI.result: 证明了CLUSTER VERTEX DELETION（2-CLAW-VD）在最大度3的二分图上NP完全；对于d≥3，d-CLAW-VD在最大度d的二分图上NP完全，且度约束最优；在无(d+1)-爪和直径2的分裂图上也是NP完全；在d-block图上有多项式时间算法。
AI.conclusion: 给出了d-CLAW-VD问题更精确的复杂性边界，既展示了该问题的广泛难解性，也找到了新的可解图类（d-block图），扩展了前人的成果。

authors_text: Brandon Yushan Feng,Mingyang Xie,Christopher A. Metzler
title: TurbuGAN: An Adversarial Learning Approach to Spatially-Varying Multiframe Blind Deconvolution with Applications to Imaging Through Turbulence
title_zh: TurbuGAN：空间变化多帧盲解卷积的对抗性学习方法及其在湍流成像中的应用
abstract: We present a self-supervised and self-calibrating multi-shot approach to imaging through atmospheric turbulence, called TurbuGAN. Our approach requires no paired training data, adapts itself to the distribution of the turbulence, leverages domain-specific data priors, and can generalize from tens to thousands of measurements. We achieve such functionality through an adversarial sensing framework adapted from CryoGAN, which uses a discriminator network to match the distributions of captured and simulated measurements. Our framework builds on CryoGAN by (1) generalizing the forward measurement model to incorporate physically accurate and computationally efficient models for light propagation through anisoplanatic turbulence, (2) enabling adaptation to slightly misspecified forward models, and (3) leveraging domain-specific prior knowledge using pretrained generative networks, when available. We validate TurbuGAN on both computationally simulated and experimentally captured images distorted with anisoplanatic turbulence.
summary: We present a self-supervised and self-calibrating multi-shot approach to imaging through atmospheric turbulence, called TurbuGAN. Our approach requires no paired training data, adapts itself to the distribution of the turbulence, leverages domain-specific data priors, and can generalize from tens to thousands of measurements. We achieve such functionality through an adversarial sensing framework adapted from CryoGAN, which uses a discriminator network to match the distributions of captured and simulated measurements. Our framework builds on CryoGAN by (1) generalizing the forward measurement model to incorporate physically accurate and computationally efficient models for light propagation through anisoplanatic turbulence, (2) enabling adaptation to slightly misspecified forward models, and (3) leveraging domain-specific prior knowledge using pretrained generative networks, when available. We validate TurbuGAN on both computationally simulated and experimentally captured images distorted with anisoplanatic turbulence.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过大气湍流进行成像的自监督和自校准多镜头方法，称为 TurbuGAN。我们的方法不需要配对的训练数据，可以适应湍流的分布，利用特定领域的数据先验，并且可以概括数十到数千个测量值。我们通过改编自 CryoGAN 的对抗性传感框架来实现此类功能，该框架使用鉴别器网络来匹配捕获和模拟测量的分布。我们的框架建立在 CryoGAN 的基础上，通过 (1) 推广前向测量模型，将物理上准确且计算高效的光传播模型纳入各等平面湍流中，(2) 能够适应稍微错误指定的前向模型，以及 (3) 在可用时，使用预训练的生成网络利用特定领域的先验知识。我们在计算模拟和实验捕获的因等电位湍流而扭曲的图像上验证了 TurbuGAN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TurbuGAN的对抗学习方法，用于解决通过大气湍流成像时的多帧盲去卷积问题。
AI.motivation: 传统成像方法在湍流环境下难以有效恢复图像，且依赖配对训练数据或无法适应不同湍流分布。
AI.method: 基于CryoGAN的对抗感知框架，改进前向测量模型以模拟各向异性湍流中的光传播，并利用预训练生成网络引入领域先验知识。
AI.result: 在计算模拟和实验捕获的湍流畸变图像上验证了TurbuGAN的有效性，展示了其对不同尺度测量数据的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TurbuGAN通过自监督和自校准机制，无需配对数据即可适应湍流分布，为复杂环境下的成像提供了新方法。

We achieve such functionality through an adversarial sensing framework adapted from CryoGAN, which uses a discriminator network to match the distributions of captured and simulated measurements. Our framework builds on CryoGAN by (1) generalizing the forward measurement model to incorporate physically accurate and computationally efficient models for light propagation through anisoplanatic turbulence, (2) enabling adaptation to slightly misspecified forward models, and (3) leveraging domain-specific prior knowledge using pretrained generative networks, when available. We validate TurbuGAN on both computationally simulated and experimentally captured images distorted with anisoplanatic turbulence. 我们提出了一种通过大气湍流进行成像的自监督和自校准多镜头方法，称为 TurbuGAN。我们的方法不需要配对的训练数据，可以适应湍流的分布，利用特定领域的数据先验，并且可以概括数十到数千个测量值。我们通过改编自 CryoGAN 的对抗性传感框架来实现此类功能，该框架使用鉴别器网络来匹配捕获和模拟测量的分布。我们的框架建立在 CryoGAN 的基础上，通过 (1) 推广前向测量模型，将物理上准确且计算高效的光传播模型纳入各等平面湍流中，(2) 能够适应稍微错误指定的前向模型，以及 (3) 在可用时，使用预训练的生成网络利用特定领域的先验知识。我们在计算模拟和实验捕获的因等电位湍流而扭曲的图像上验证了 TurbuGAN。 本文提出了一种名为TurbuGAN的对抗学习方法，用于解决通过大气湍流成像时的多帧盲去卷积问题。 Brandon Yushan Feng,Mingyang Xie,Christopher A. Metzler cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Yuan Gong,Sameer Khurana,Andrew Rouditchenko,James Glass
title: CMKD: CNN/Transformer-Based Cross-Model Knowledge Distillation for Audio Classification
title_zh: CMKD：用于音频分类的基于 CNN/Transformer 的跨模型知识蒸馏
abstract: Audio classification is an active research area with a wide range of applications. Over the past decade, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been the de-facto standard building block for end-to-end audio classification models. Recently, neural networks based solely on self-attention mechanisms such as the Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) have been shown to outperform CNNs. In this paper, we find an intriguing interaction between the two very different models - CNN and AST models are good teachers for each other. When we use either of them as the teacher and train the other model as the student via knowledge distillation (KD), the performance of the student model noticeably improves, and in many cases, is better than the teacher model. In our experiments with this CNN/Transformer Cross-Model Knowledge Distillation (CMKD) method we achieve new state-of-the-art performance on FSD50K, AudioSet, and ESC-50.
summary: Audio classification is an active research area with a wide range of applications. Over the past decade, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been the de-facto standard building block for end-to-end audio classification models. Recently, neural networks based solely on self-attention mechanisms such as the Audio Spectrogram Transformer (AST) have been shown to outperform CNNs. In this paper, we find an intriguing interaction between the two very different models - CNN and AST models are good teachers for each other. When we use either of them as the teacher and train the other model as the student via knowledge distillation (KD), the performance of the student model noticeably improves, and in many cases, is better than the teacher model. In our experiments with this CNN/Transformer Cross-Model Knowledge Distillation (CMKD) method we achieve new state-of-the-art performance on FSD50K, AudioSet, and ESC-50.
abstract_zh: 音频分类是一个活跃的研究领域，具有广泛的应用。在过去的十年中，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已成为端到端音频分类模型事实上的标准构建块。最近，仅基于自注意力机制的神经网络（例如音频频谱图变换器（AST））已被证明优于 CNN。在本文中，我们发现了两个截然不同的模型之间有趣的相互作用——CNN 和 AST 模型是彼此的好老师。当我们使用其中一个模型作为教师并通过知识蒸馏（KD）训练另一个模型作为学生时，学生模型的性能显着提高，并且在许多情况下优于教师模型。在我们使用 CNN/Transformer 跨模型知识蒸馏 (CMKD) 方法进行的实验中，我们在 FSD50K、AudioSet 和 ESC-50 上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于CNN和Transformer的跨模型知识蒸馏方法（CMKD），通过相互教学提升音频分类模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN是音频分类的传统标准，但基于自注意力的Transformer模型（如AST）表现更优。作者发现两者可互相作为教师模型，通过知识蒸馏进一步提升性能。
AI.method: 采用CNN或Transformer作为教师模型，训练对方作为学生模型进行知识蒸馏，利用跨模型的知识迁移优化模型参数。
AI.result: 在FSD50K、AudioSet和ESC-50数据集上取得新的SOTA性能，学生模型在许多情况下超越教师模型。
AI.conclusion: 跨模型知识蒸馏能有效融合CNN与Transformer的优势，在音频分类任务中显著提升模型性能。

authors_text: David Freire-Obregón,Javier Lorenzo-Navarro,Modesto Castrillón-Santana
title: Decontextualized I3D ConvNet for ultra-distance runners performance analysis at a glance
title_zh: 用于超长跑运动员表现分析的去上下文化 I3D ConvNet 一目了然
comment: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
comments: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
abstract: In May 2021, the site runnersworld.com published that participation in ultra-distance races has increased by 1,676% in the last 23 years. Moreover, nearly 41% of those runners participate in more than one race per year. The development of wearable devices has undoubtedly contributed to motivating participants by providing performance measures in real-time. However, we believe there is room for improvement, particularly from the organizers point of view. This work aims to determine how the runners performance can be quantified and predicted by considering a non-invasive technique focusing on the ultra-running scenario. In this sense, participants are captured when they pass through a set of locations placed along the race track. Each footage is considered an input to an I3D ConvNet to extract the participant's running gait in our work. Furthermore, weather and illumination capture conditions or occlusions may affect these footages due to the race staff and other runners. To address this challenging task, we have tracked and codified the participant's running gait at some RPs and removed the context intending to ensure a runner-of-interest proper evaluation. The evaluation suggests that the features extracted by an I3D ConvNet provide enough information to estimate the participant's performance along the different race tracks.
summary: In May 2021, the site runnersworld.com published that participation in ultra-distance races has increased by 1,676% in the last 23 years. Moreover, nearly 41% of those runners participate in more than one race per year. The development of wearable devices has undoubtedly contributed to motivating participants by providing performance measures in real-time. However, we believe there is room for improvement, particularly from the organizers point of view. This work aims to determine how the runners performance can be quantified and predicted by considering a non-invasive technique focusing on the ultra-running scenario. In this sense, participants are captured when they pass through a set of locations placed along the race track. Each footage is considered an input to an I3D ConvNet to extract the participant's running gait in our work. Furthermore, weather and illumination capture conditions or occlusions may affect these footages due to the race staff and other runners. To address this challenging task, we have tracked and codified the participant's running gait at some RPs and removed the context intending to ensure a runner-of-interest proper evaluation. The evaluation suggests that the features extracted by an I3D ConvNet provide enough information to estimate the participant's performance along the different race tracks.
abstract_zh: 2021 年 5 月，runnersworld.com 网站发布称，过去 23 年来，超长跑比赛的参与人数增加了 1,676%。此外，近 41% 的跑步者每年参加不止一场比赛。可穿戴设备的发展无疑有助于通过提供实时绩效衡量来激励参与者。然而，我们认为还有改进的空间，特别是从组织者的角度来看。这项工作旨在确定如何通过考虑专注于超跑场景的非侵入性技术来量化和预测跑步者的表现。从这个意义上说，当参与者经过赛道上的一组位置时，他们就会被捕获。每个片段都被视为 I3D ConvNet 的输入，以在我们的工作中提取参与者的跑步步态。此外，由于比赛工作人员和其他跑步者的原因，天气和照明捕捉条件或遮挡可能会影响这些镜头。为了解决这项具有挑战性的任务，我们跟踪并编码了参与者在一些 RP 处的跑步步态，并删除了上下文，以确保对感兴趣的跑步者进行正确的评估。评估表明，I3D ConvNet 提取的特征提供了足够的信息来估计参与者在不同赛道上的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于去上下文I3D卷积网络的非侵入式方法，通过赛道关键点视频分析超长距离跑者的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管可穿戴设备普及，但赛事组织者仍需更高效的跑者表现量化手段，现有技术受环境因素和遮挡影响较大。
AI.method: 在赛道关键点部署摄像机采集跑者视频，使用I3D卷积网络提取跑步姿态特征，并通过去上下文处理消除干扰因素影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，I3D网络提取的特征能有效估计跑者在不同赛道段的表现，具备实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为赛事组织者提供了基于视频分析的非接触式跑者评估方案，可补充现有可穿戴设备的局限性。

authors_text: Simon Bilik,Karel Horak
title: Feature space reduction as data preprocessing for the anomaly detection
title_zh: 特征空间缩减作为异常检测的数据预处理
comment: 27th Conference STUDENT EEICT 2020, Brno University of Technology
comments: 27th Conference STUDENT EEICT 2020, Brno University of Technology
abstract: In this paper, we present two pipelines in order to reduce the feature space for anomaly detection using the One Class SVM. As a first stage of both pipelines, we compare the performance of three convolutional autoencoders. We use the PCA method together with t-SNE as the first pipeline and the reconstruction errors based method as the second. Both methods have potential for the anomaly detection, but the reconstruction error metrics prove to be more robust for this task. We show that the convolutional autoencoder architecture doesn't have a significant effect for this task and we prove the potential of our approach on the real world dataset.
summary: In this paper, we present two pipelines in order to reduce the feature space for anomaly detection using the One Class SVM. As a first stage of both pipelines, we compare the performance of three convolutional autoencoders. We use the PCA method together with t-SNE as the first pipeline and the reconstruction errors based method as the second. Both methods have potential for the anomaly detection, but the reconstruction error metrics prove to be more robust for this task. We show that the convolutional autoencoder architecture doesn't have a significant effect for this task and we prove the potential of our approach on the real world dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了两个流程，以减少使用 One Class SVM 进行异常检测的特征空间。作为两个管道的第一阶段，我们比较了三个卷积自动编码器的性能。我们使用 PCA 方法和 t-SNE 作为第一个流程，使用基于重建误差的方法作为第二个流程。这两种方法都具有异常检测的潜力，但事实证明，重建误差指标对于这项任务更加稳健。我们证明卷积自动编码器架构对此任务没有显着影响，并且我们证明了我们的方法在现实世界数据集上的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种特征空间缩减流程作为异常检测的预处理方法，基于One Class SVM并比较不同特征提取技术的效果。
AI.motivation: 高维特征空间可能导致异常检测性能下降，需通过有效特征缩减提升模型鲁棒性与效率。
AI.method: 设计双流程：1) PCA结合t-SNE降维；2) 基于重建误差的自编码器方法，并对比三种卷积自编码器架构的影响。
AI.result: 重建误差方法在异常检测中表现更稳健，且卷积自编码器结构对任务效果无显著影响，实测数据验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 特征空间缩减通过重建误差指标能更可靠地辅助异常检测，网络结构选择并非关键因素。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出两种特征空间缩减流程作为异常检测的预处理方法，基于One Class SVM并比较不同特征提取技术的效果。
ai_content.motivation: 高维特征空间可能导致异常检测性能下降，需通过有效特征缩减提升模型鲁棒性与效率。
ai_content.method: 设计双流程：1) PCA结合t-SNE降维；2) 基于重建误差的自编码器方法，并对比三种卷积自编码器架构的影响。

ai_content.conclusion: 特征空间缩减通过重建误差指标能更可靠地辅助异常检测，网络结构选择并非关键因素。

search_text: Feature space reduction as data preprocessing for the anomaly detection 特征空间缩减作为异常检测的数据预处理 In this paper, we present two pipelines in order to reduce the feature space for anomaly detection using the One Class SVM. As a first stage of both pipelines, we compare the performance of three convolutional autoencoders. We use the PCA method together with t-SNE as the first pipeline and the reconstruction errors based method as the second. Both methods have potential for the anomaly detection, but the reconstruction error metrics prove to be more robust for this task. We show that the convolutional autoencoder architecture doesn't have a significant effect for this task and we prove the potential of our approach on the real world dataset. 在本文中，我们提出了两个流程，以减少使用 One Class SVM 进行异常检测的特征空间。作为两个管道的第一阶段，我们比较了三个卷积自动编码器的性能。我们使用 PCA 方法和 t-SNE 作为第一个流程，使用基于重建误差的方法作为第二个流程。这两种方法都具有异常检测的潜力，但事实证明，重建误差指标对于这项任务更加稳健。我们证明卷积自动编码器架构对此任务没有显着影响，并且我们证明了我们的方法在现实世界数据集上的潜力。 本文提出两种特征空间缩减流程作为异常检测的预处理方法，基于One Class SVM并比较不同特征提取技术的效果。 Simon Bilik,Karel Horak cs.CV

authors_text: Md. Shafaat Jamil Rokon,Md Kishor Morol,Ishra Binte Hasan,A. M. Saif,Rafid Hussain Khan
title: Food Recipe Recommendation Based on Ingredients Detection Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于深度学习成分检测的食物食谱推荐
abstract: Food is essential for human survival, and people always try to taste different types of delicious recipes. Frequently, people choose food ingredients without even knowing their names or pick up some food ingredients that are not obvious to them from a grocery store. Knowing which ingredients can be mixed to make a delicious food recipe is essential. Selecting the right recipe by choosing a list of ingredients is very difficult for a beginner cook. However, it can be a problem even for experts. One such example is recognising objects through image processing. Although this process is complex due to different food ingredients, traditional approaches will lead to an inaccuracy rate. These problems can be solved by machine learning and deep learning approaches. In this paper, we implemented a model for food ingredients recognition and designed an algorithm for recommending recipes based on recognised ingredients. We made a custom dataset consisting of 9856 images belonging to 32 different food ingredients classes. Convolution Neural Network (CNN) model was used to identify food ingredients, and for recipe recommendations, we have used machine learning. We achieved an accuracy of 94 percent, which is quite impressive.

Frequently, people choose food ingredients without even knowing their names or pick up some food ingredients that are not obvious to them from a grocery store. However, it can be a problem even for experts. One such example is recognising objects through image processing. Although this process is complex due to different food ingredients, traditional approaches will lead to an inaccuracy rate. These problems can be solved by machine learning and deep learning approaches. In this paper, we implemented a model for food ingredients recognition and designed an algorithm for recommending recipes based on recognised ingredients. We made a custom dataset consisting of 9856 images belonging to 32 different food ingredients classes. Convolution Neural Network (CNN) model was used to identify food ingredients, and for recipe recommendations, we have used machine learning. We achieved an accuracy of 94 percent, which is quite impressive.
abstract_zh: 食物是人类生存所必需的，人们总是尝试着品尝不同类型的美味食谱。人们常常在不知道食品成分名称的情况下选择食品成分，或者从杂货店挑选一些他们不明显的食品成分。知道可以混合哪些成分来制作美味的食物食谱至关重要。对于初学者来说，通过选择食材列表来选择正确的食谱是非常困难的。然而，即使对于专家来说，这也可能是一个问题。其中一个例子是通过图像处理来识别物体。尽管由于食品成分不同，这个过程很复杂，但传统方法会导致不准确率。这些问题可以通过机器学习和深度学习方法来解决。在本文中，我们实现了一个食品成分识别模型，并设计了一种基于识别成分推荐食谱的算法。我们制作了一个自定义数据集，其中包含属于 32 个不同食品成分类别的 9856 张图像。卷积神经网络（CNN）模型用于识别食品成分，而对于食谱推荐，我们使用了机器学习。我们的准确率达到了 94%，这是相当令人印象深刻的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的食材检测与食谱推荐系统，通过识别食材图像并推荐相应食谱。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在食材识别和食谱推荐中存在准确性不足的问题，而用户常因不熟悉食材名称或组合方式而难以选择合适食谱。
AI.method: 构建包含9856张图像的32类食材数据集，使用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行食材识别，并结合机器学习算法实现食谱推荐。
AI.result: 在食材识别任务中达到94%的准确率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习显著提升了食材识别与食谱推荐的准确性，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Benjamin Moore,Luke Postle,Lise Turner
title: Local Hadwiger's Conjecture
title_zh: 局部哈维格猜想
abstract: We propose local versions of Hadwiger's Conjecture, where only balls of radius $Ω(\log(v(G)))$ around each vertex are required to be $K_{t}$-minor-free. We ask: if a graph is locally-$K_{t}$-minor-free, is it $t$-colourable? We show that the answer is yes when $t \leq 5$, even in the stronger setting of list-colouring, and we complement this result with a $O(\log v(G))$-round distributed colouring algorithm in the LOCAL model. Further, we show that for large enough values of $t$, we can list-colour locally-$K_{t}$-minor-free graphs with $13\cdot \max\left\{h(t),\left\lceil \frac{31}{2}(t-1) \right\rceil \right\})$colours, where $h(t)$ is any value such that all $K_{t}$-minor-free graphs are $h(t)$-list-colourable. We again complement this with a $O(\log v(G))$-round distributed algorithm.
summary: We propose local versions of Hadwiger's Conjecture, where only balls of radius $Ω(\log(v(G)))$ around each vertex are required to be $K_{t}$-minor-free. We ask: if a graph is locally-$K_{t}$-minor-free, is it $t$-colourable? We show that the answer is yes when $t \leq 5$, even in the stronger setting of list-colouring, and we complement this result with a $O(\log v(G))$-round distributed colouring algorithm in the LOCAL model. Further, we show that for large enough values of $t$, we can list-colour locally-$K_{t}$-minor-free graphs with $13\cdot \max\left\{h(t),\left\lceil \frac{31}{2}(t-1) \right\rceil \right\})$colours, where $h(t)$ is any value such that all $K_{t}$-minor-free graphs are $h(t)$-list-colourable. We again complement this with a $O(\log v(G))$-round distributed algorithm.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了哈维格猜想的本地版本，其中只有每个顶点周围半径为 $Ω(\log(v(G)))$ 的球才需要是 $K_{t}$ 无次要的。我们问：如果一个图是局部$K_{t}$-次要自由的，那么它是$t$-可着色的吗？我们证明，当 $t \leq 5$ 时，即使在更强的列表着色设置下，答案也是肯定的，并且我们在 LOCAL 模型中用 $O(\log v(G))$ 轮分布式着色算法来补充这个结果。此外，我们表明，对于足够大的 $t$ 值，我们可以使用 $13\cdot \max\left\{h(t),\left\lceil \frac{31}{2}(t-1) \right\rceil \right\})$colours 列出本地 $K_{t}$-无次要图的颜色，其中 $h(t)$ 是任何值，使得所有 $K_{t}$-无次要图都是$h(t)$-列表-可着色。我们再次用 $O(\log v(G))$ 轮分布式算法来补充这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并研究了图论中哈迪格猜想的局部版本，探讨局部K_t-小图自由图的t着色问题。
AI.motivation: 传统哈迪格猜想要求图整体不含K_t小图，但实际应用中局部结构可能更易处理，因此提出局部条件以放宽约束并探索着色可能性。
AI.method: 通过分析局部邻域（半径Ω(log v(G))）的K_t-小图自由性质，结合列表着色理论与分布式算法设计，验证不同t值下的着色结果。
AI.result: 证明当t≤5时局部K_t-小图自由图可t着色，并提供O(log v(G))轮LOCAL模型算法；对较大t值，给出基于h(t)的着色色数上界及对应分布式算法。
AI.conclusion: 局部条件有效弱化哈迪格猜想，为图着色提供新视角，且分布式算法结果对大规模网络应用具有实际意义。

authors_text: Xiaohan Ding,Xiangyu Zhang,Yizhuang Zhou,Jungong Han,Guiguang Ding,Jian Sun
title: Scaling Up Your Kernels to 31x31: Revisiting Large Kernel Design in CNNs
title_zh: 将内核扩展到 31x31：重新审视 CNN 中的大型内核设计
abstract: We revisit large kernel design in modern convolutional neural networks (CNNs). Inspired by recent advances in vision transformers (ViTs), in this paper, we demonstrate that using a few large convolutional kernels instead of a stack of small kernels could be a more powerful paradigm. We suggested five guidelines, e.g., applying re-parameterized large depth-wise convolutions, to design efficient high-performance large-kernel CNNs. Following the guidelines, we propose RepLKNet, a pure CNN architecture whose kernel size is as large as 31x31, in contrast to commonly used 3x3. RepLKNet greatly closes the performance gap between CNNs and ViTs, e.g., achieving comparable or superior results than Swin Transformer on ImageNet and a few typical downstream tasks, with lower latency. RepLKNet also shows nice scalability to big data and large models, obtaining 87.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet and 56.0% mIoU on ADE20K, which is very competitive among the state-of-the-arts with similar model sizes. Our study further reveals that, in contrast to small-kernel CNNs, large-kernel CNNs have much larger effective receptive fields and higher shape bias rather than texture bias. Code & models at https://github.com/megvii-research/RepLKNet.

We suggested five guidelines, e.g., applying re-parameterized large depth-wise convolutions, to design efficient high-performance large-kernel CNNs. Following the guidelines, we propose RepLKNet, a pure CNN architecture whose kernel size is as large as 31x31, in contrast to commonly used 3x3. RepLKNet greatly closes the performance gap between CNNs and ViTs, e.g., achieving comparable or superior results than Swin Transformer on ImageNet and a few typical downstream tasks, with lower latency. RepLKNet also shows nice scalability to big data and large models, obtaining 87.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet and 56.0% mIoU on ADE20K, which is very competitive among the state-of-the-arts with similar model sizes. Code & models at https://github.com/megvii-research/RepLKNet.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视现代卷积神经网络 (CNN) 中的大型内核设计。受视觉变换器（ViT）最新进展的启发，在本文中，我们证明使用几个大的卷积核而不是一堆小核可能是一个更强大的范例。我们提出了五个指南，例如，应用重新参数化的大深度卷积来设计高效的高性能大内核 CNN。遵循该指南，我们提出了 RepLKNet，这是一种纯 CNN 架构，其内核大小高达 31x31，而不是常用的 3x3。 RepLKNet 极大地缩小了 CNN 和 ViT 之间的性能差距，例如，在 ImageNet 和一些典型的下游任务上实现了与 Swin Transformer 相当或更好的结果，并且延迟更低。 RepLKNet还对大数据和大型模型表现出了良好的可扩展性，在ImageNet上获得了87.8%的top-1准确率，在ADE20K上获得了56.0%的mIoU，这在具有类似模型大小的最先进技术中非常具有竞争力。我们的研究进一步表明，与小内核 CNN 相比，大内核 CNN 具有更大的有效感受野和更高的形状偏差（而不是纹理偏差）。代码和模型位于 https://github.com/megvii-research/RepLKNet。

AI.tldr: 本文重新设计大卷积核以提升CNN性能，提出RepLKNet架构，通过使用31x31大核缩小与ViTs的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 受视觉变换器（ViTs）启发，认为大卷积核可能比堆叠小核更高效，但需解决大核设计的挑战以提升CNN性能。
AI.method: 提出五项设计指南（如重新参数化大深度卷积），构建RepLKNet，采用31x31大核并优化计算效率。
AI.result: RepLKNet在ImageNet达87.8% top-1准确率，在ADE20K达56.0% mIoU，性能优于Swin Transformer且延迟更低。
AI.conclusion: 大核CNN具有更大感受野和形状偏差优势，可作为ViT的有效替代方案，且具备良好可扩展性。

Following the guidelines, we propose RepLKNet, a pure CNN architecture whose kernel size is as large as 31x31, in contrast to commonly used 3x3. Our study further reveals that, in contrast to small-kernel CNNs, large-kernel CNNs have much larger effective receptive fields and higher shape bias rather than texture bias. authors_text: Xindong Zhang,Hui Zeng,Shi Guo,Lei Zhang
title: Efficient Long-Range Attention Network for Image Super-resolution
title_zh: 用于图像超分辨率的高效远程注意力网络
abstract: Recently, transformer-based methods have demonstrated impressive results in various vision tasks, including image super-resolution (SR), by exploiting the self-attention (SA) for feature extraction. However, the computation of SA in most existing transformer based models is very expensive, while some employed operations may be redundant for the SR task. This limits the range of SA computation and consequently the SR performance. In this work, we propose an efficient long-range attention network (ELAN) for image SR. Specifically, we first employ shift convolution (shift-conv) to effectively extract the image local structural information while maintaining the same level of complexity as 1x1 convolution, then propose a group-wise multi-scale self-attention (GMSA) module, which calculates SA on non-overlapped groups of features using different window sizes to exploit the long-range image dependency. A highly efficient long-range attention block (ELAB) is then built by simply cascading two shift-conv with a GMSA module, which is further accelerated by using a shared attention mechanism. Without bells and whistles, our ELAN follows a fairly simple design by sequentially cascading the ELABs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ELAN obtains even better results against the transformer-based SR models but with significantly less complexity. The source code can be found at https://github.com/xindongzhang/ELAN.
summary: Recently, transformer-based methods have demonstrated impressive results in various vision tasks, including image super-resolution (SR), by exploiting the self-attention (SA) for feature extraction. However, the computation of SA in most existing transformer based models is very expensive, while some employed operations may be redundant for the SR task. This limits the range of SA computation and consequently the SR performance. In this work, we propose an efficient long-range attention network (ELAN) for image SR. Specifically, we first employ shift convolution (shift-conv) to effectively extract the image local structural information while maintaining the same level of complexity as 1x1 convolution, then propose a group-wise multi-scale self-attention (GMSA) module, which calculates SA on non-overlapped groups of features using different window sizes to exploit the long-range image dependency. A highly efficient long-range attention block (ELAB) is then built by simply cascading two shift-conv with a GMSA module, which is further accelerated by using a shared attention mechanism. Without bells and whistles, our ELAN follows a fairly simple design by sequentially cascading the ELABs. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ELAN obtains even better results against the transformer-based SR models but with significantly less complexity. The source code can be found at https://github.com/xindongzhang/ELAN.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于 Transformer 的方法通过利用自注意力（SA）进行特征提取，在各种视觉任务中展示了令人印象深刻的结果，包括图像超分辨率（SR）。然而，在大多数现有的基于变压器的模型中，SA 的计算非常昂贵，而某些使用的操作对于 SR 任务来说可能是多余的。这限制了 SA 计算的范围，从而限制了 SR 性能。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于图像 SR 的高效远程注意网络（ELAN）。具体来说，我们首先采用移位卷积（shift-conv）有效地提取图像局部结构信息，同时保持与 1x1 卷积相同的复杂度，然后提出一种分组多尺度自注意力（GMSA）模块，该模块使用不同的窗口大小在非重叠特征组上计算 SA，以利用远程图像依赖性。然后通过简单地级联两个 Shift-Con 与 GMSA 模块来构建高效的远程注意力块（ELAB），并通过使用共享注意力机制进一步加速。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的 ELAN 通过顺序级联 ELAB 遵循相当简单的设计。大量实验表明，与基于变压器的 SR 模型相比，ELAN 获得了更好的结果，但复杂性显着降低。源代码可以在https://github.com/xindongzhang/ELAN找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的长距离注意力网络（ELAN），用于图像超分辨率任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于Transformer的方法在图像超分辨率任务中表现优异，但自注意力机制的计算成本较高，且部分操作可能对超分辨率任务冗余，从而限制了其性能。
AI.method: 本文首先使用移位卷积提取图像局部结构信息，然后提出组内多尺度自注意力模块（GMSA），通过不同窗口大小计算非重叠特征组的自注意力，以捕捉长距离依赖关系。最后构建高效的长距离注意力块（ELAB），并简单级联多个ELAB实现ELAN。
AI.result: 实验表明，ELAN在保持较低复杂度的同时，取得了优于现有基于Transformer的超分辨率模型的结果。
AI.conclusion: ELAN通过移位卷积和GMSA模块，实现了高效的长距离注意力机制，为图像超分辨率任务提供了更优的解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaojie Chu,Yongtao Wang,Chunhua Shen,Jingdong Chen,Wei Chu
title: Training Protocol Matters: Towards Accurate Scene Text Recognition via Training Protocol Searching
title_zh: 训练协议很重要：通过训练协议搜索实现准确的场景文本识别
abstract: The development of scene text recognition (STR) in the era of deep learning has been mainly focused on novel architectures of STR models. However, training protocol (i.e., settings of the hyper-parameters involved in the training of STR models), which plays an equally important role in successfully training a good STR model, is under-explored for scene text recognition. In this work, we attempt to improve the accuracy of existing STR models by searching for optimal training protocol. Specifically, we develop a training protocol search algorithm, based on a newly designed search space and an efficient search algorithm using evolutionary optimization and proxy tasks. Experimental results show that our searched training protocol can improve the recognition accuracy of mainstream STR models by 2.7%~3.9%. In particular, with the searched training protocol, TRBA-Net achieves 2.1% higher accuracy than the state-of-the-art STR model (i.e., EFIFSTR), while the inference speed is 2.3x and 3.7x faster on CPU and GPU respectively. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and the generalization ability of the training protocol found by our search method. Code is available at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/STR_TPSearch.

Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and the generalization ability of the training protocol found by our search method. Code is available at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/STR_TPSearch.
abstract_zh: 深度学习时代场景文本识别（STR）的发展主要集中在STR模型的新颖架构上。然而，训练协议（即训练 STR 模型所涉及的超参数的设置）在成功训练良好的 STR 模型方面发挥着同样重要的作用，但在场景文本识别方面尚未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们尝试通过寻找最佳训练协议来提高现有 STR 模型的准确性。具体来说，我们基于新设计的搜索空间和使用进化优化和代理任务的高效搜索算法开发了一种训练协议搜索算法。实验结果表明，我们搜索到的训练协议可以将主流STR模型的识别准确率提高2.7%~3.9%。特别是，通过搜索训练协议，TRBA-Net 的准确度比最先进的 STR 模型（即 EFIFSTR）高 2.1%，而 CPU 和 GPU 上的推理速度分别快 2.3 倍和 3.7 倍。进行了大量的实验来证明所提出的方法的有效性以及我们的搜索方法找到的训练协议的泛化能力。代码可在 https://github.com/VDIGPKU/STR_TPSearch 获取。

AI.tldr: 通过搜索最优训练协议提升场景文本识别模型的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度关注模型架构而忽视训练协议（超参数设置）对场景文本识别性能的关键影响。
AI.method: 设计新型搜索空间并结合进化优化与代理任务的高效搜索算法，寻找最优训练协议。
AI.result: 主流模型准确率提升2.7%-3.9%，TRBA-Net在CPU/GPU上分别快2.3x/3.7x且精度超越EFIFSTR。
AI.conclusion: 训练协议搜索方法有效且具泛化性，代码开源促进后续研究。

search_text: Training Protocol Matters: Towards Accurate Scene Text Recognition via Training Protocol Searching 训练协议很重要：通过训练协议搜索实现准确的场景文本识别 The development of scene text recognition (STR) in the era of deep learning has been mainly focused on novel architectures of STR models. However, training protocol (i.e., settings of the hyper-parameters involved in the training of STR models), which plays an equally important role in successfully training a good STR model, is under-explored for scene text recognition. In this work, we attempt to improve the accuracy of existing STR models by searching for optimal training protocol. Specifically, we develop a training protocol search algorithm, based on a newly designed search space and an efficient search algorithm using evolutionary optimization and proxy tasks. Experimental results show that our searched training protocol can improve the recognition accuracy of mainstream STR models by 2.7%~3.9%. In particular, with the searched training protocol, TRBA-Net achieves 2.1% higher accuracy than the state-of-the-art STR model (i.e., EFIFSTR), while the inference speed is 2.3x and 3.7x faster on CPU and GPU respectively. Extensive experiments are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method and the generalization ability of the training protocol found by our search method. Code is available at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/STR_TPSearch. 深度学习时代场景文本识别（STR）的发展主要集中在STR模型的新颖架构上。然而，训练协议（即训练 STR 模型所涉及的超参数的设置）在成功训练良好的 STR 模型方面发挥着同样重要的作用，但在场景文本识别方面尚未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们尝试通过寻找最佳训练协议来提高现有 STR 模型的准确性。具体来说，我们基于新设计的搜索空间和使用进化优化和代理任务的高效搜索算法开发了一种训练协议搜索算法。实验结果表明，我们搜索到的训练协议可以将主流STR模型的识别准确率提高2.7%~3.9%。特别是，通过搜索训练协议，TRBA-Net 的准确度比最先进的 STR 模型（即 EFIFSTR）高 2.1%，而 CPU 和 GPU 上的推理速度分别快 2.3 倍和 3.7 倍。进行了大量的实验来证明所提出的方法的有效性以及我们的搜索方法找到的训练协议的泛化能力。代码可在 https://github.com/VDIGPKU/STR_TPSearch 获取。 通过搜索最优训练协议提升场景文本识别模型的准确性。 Xiaojie Chu,Yongtao Wang,Chunhua Shen,Jingdong Chen,Wei Chu cs.CV

authors_text: Naser Damer,César Augusto Fontanillo López,Meiling Fang,Noémie Spiller,Minh Vu Pham,Fadi Boutros
title: Privacy-friendly Synthetic Data for the Development of Face Morphing Attack Detectors
title_zh: 用于开发人脸变形攻击检测器的隐私友好合成数据
abstract: The main question this work aims at answering is: "can morphing attack detection (MAD) solutions be successfully developed based on synthetic data?". Towards that, this work introduces the first synthetic-based MAD development dataset, namely the Synthetic Morphing Attack Detection Development dataset (SMDD). This dataset is utilized successfully to train three MAD backbones where it proved to lead to high MAD performance, even on completely unknown attack types. Additionally, an essential aspect of this work is the detailed legal analyses of the challenges of using and sharing real biometric data, rendering our proposed SMDD dataset extremely essential. The SMDD dataset, consisting of 30,000 attack and 50,000 bona fide samples, is publicly available for research purposes.
summary: The main question this work aims at answering is: "can morphing attack detection (MAD) solutions be successfully developed based on synthetic data?". Towards that, this work introduces the first synthetic-based MAD development dataset, namely the Synthetic Morphing Attack Detection Development dataset (SMDD). This dataset is utilized successfully to train three MAD backbones where it proved to lead to high MAD performance, even on completely unknown attack types. Additionally, an essential aspect of this work is the detailed legal analyses of the challenges of using and sharing real biometric data, rendering our proposed SMDD dataset extremely essential. The SMDD dataset, consisting of 30,000 attack and 50,000 bona fide samples, is publicly available for research purposes.
abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在回答的主要问题是：“能否基于合成数据成功开发变形攻击检测（MAD）解决方案？”。为此，这项工作引入了第一个基于合成的 MAD 开发数据集，即合成变形攻击检测开发数据集 (SMDD)。该数据集已成功用于训练三个 MAD 主干网络，事实证明，即使在完全未知的攻击类型上，它也能实现较高的 MAD 性能。此外，这项工作的一个重要方面是对使用和共享真实生物识别数据的挑战进行详细的法律分析，这使得我们提出的 SMDD 数据集极其重要。 SMDD 数据集由 30,000 个攻击样本和 50,000 个善意样本组成，可公开用于研究目的。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在开发一种基于合成数据的隐私保护方法，用于训练高效的人脸融合攻击检测系统，并验证其在未知攻击类型上的有效性。
AI.motivation: 由于使用和共享真实生物数据存在法律和隐私问题，论文旨在提供一种隐私友好的合成数据解决方案，以促进MAD技术的发展，同时避免敏感数据的使用。
AI.method: 研究团队构建了包含30,000个攻击样本和50,000个真实样本的SMDD合成数据集，并利用该数据集训练三种MAD模型架构，通过实验验证其性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于SMDD数据集训练的MAD模型在检测已知和未知攻击类型时均达到较高准确率，验证了合成数据的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 论文证明了合成数据在开发MAD系统中的有效性，并通过法律分析强调了其在隐私保护方面的必要性，为未来研究提供了重要的数据资源和方法论参考。
