authors_text: Tong Owen Yang
title: Algebraic Learning: Towards Interpretable Information Modeling
title_zh: 代数学习：走向可解释的信息模型
abstract: Along with the proliferation of digital data collected using sensor technologies and a boost of computing power, Deep Learning (DL) based approaches have drawn enormous attention in the past decade due to their impressive performance in extracting complex relations from raw data and representing valuable information. Meanwhile, though, rooted in its notorious black-box nature, the appreciation of DL has been highly debated due to the lack of interpretability. On the one hand, DL only utilizes statistical features contained in raw data while ignoring human knowledge of the underlying system, which results in both data inefficiency and trust issues; on the other hand, a trained DL model does not provide to researchers any extra insight about the underlying system beyond its output, which, however, is the essence of most fields of science, e.g. physics and economics. This thesis addresses the issue of interpretability in general information modeling and endeavors to ease the problem from two scopes. Firstly, a problem-oriented perspective is applied to incorporate knowledge into modeling practice, where interesting mathematical properties emerge naturally which cast constraints on modeling. Secondly, given a trained model, various methods could be applied to extract further insights about the underlying system. These two pathways are termed as guided model design and secondary measurements. Remarkably, a novel scheme emerges for the modeling practice in statistical learning: Algebraic Learning (AgLr). Instead of being restricted to the discussion of any specific model, AgLr starts from idiosyncrasies of a learning task itself and studies the structure of a legitimate model class. This novel scheme demonstrates the noteworthy value of abstract algebra for general AI, which has been overlooked in recent progress, and could shed further light on interpretable information modeling.
summary: Along with the proliferation of digital data collected using sensor technologies and a boost of computing power, Deep Learning (DL) based approaches have drawn enormous attention in the past decade due to their impressive performance in extracting complex relations from raw data and representing valuable information. Meanwhile, though, rooted in its notorious black-box nature, the appreciation of DL has been highly debated due to the lack of interpretability. On the one hand, DL only utilizes statistical features contained in raw data while ignoring human knowledge of the underlying system, which results in both data inefficiency and trust issues; on the other hand, a trained DL model does not provide to researchers any extra insight about the underlying system beyond its output, which, however, is the essence of most fields of science, e.g. physics and economics. This thesis addresses the issue of interpretability in general information modeling and endeavors to ease the problem from two scopes. Firstly, a problem-oriented perspective is applied to incorporate knowledge into modeling practice, where interesting mathematical properties emerge naturally which cast constraints on modeling. Secondly, given a trained model, various methods could be applied to extract further insights about the underlying system. These two pathways are termed as guided model design and secondary measurements. Remarkably, a novel scheme emerges for the modeling practice in statistical learning: Algebraic Learning (AgLr). Instead of being restricted to the discussion of any specific model, AgLr starts from idiosyncrasies of a learning task itself and studies the structure of a legitimate model class. This novel scheme demonstrates the noteworthy value of abstract algebra for general AI, which has been overlooked in recent progress, and could shed further light on interpretable information modeling.
abstract_zh: 随着使用传感器技术收集的数字数据的激增和计算能力的提高，基于深度学习（DL）的方法在过去十年中因其在从原始数据中提取复杂关系和表示有价值信息方面的令人印象深刻的性能而引起了极大的关注。与此同时，由于深度学习臭名昭著的黑匣子性质，由于缺乏可解释性，深度学习的价值一直备受争议。一方面，深度学习仅利用原始数据中包含的统计特征，而忽略了人类对底层系统的了解，导致数据效率低下和信任问题；另一方面，经过训练的深度学习模型不会为研究人员提供除其输出之外的任何关于底层系统的额外见解，然而，这是大多数科学领域的本质，例如：物理学和经济学。本文解决了一般信息建模中的可解释性问题，并努力从两个范围来缓解该问题。首先，以问题为导向的视角将知识融入建模实践中，有趣的数学属性自然出现，对建模产生约束。其次，给定一个经过训练的模型，可以应用各种方法来提取有关底层系统的进一步见解。这两条途径被称为引导模型设计和二次测量。值得注意的是，统计学习中的建模实践出现了一种新颖的方案：代数学习（AgLr）。 AgLr 并不局限于对任何特定模型的讨论，而是从学习任务本身的特质出发，研究合法模型类的结构。这个新颖的方案展示了抽象代数对于通用人工智能的显着价值，这一点在最近的进展中被忽视了，并且可以进一步阐明可解释的信息模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出代数学习（Algebraic Learning）方法，旨在解决深度学习在信息建模中的可解释性问题，通过结合数学结构约束和模型后分析提升模型的透明性与科学性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习虽性能优异，但其黑箱特性导致数据效率低下、缺乏对系统内在机制的洞察，难以满足科学领域对模型可解释性的需求。
AI.method: 从两个方向入手：1）通过问题导向建模引入数学约束，利用代数结构定义合法模型类；2）通过二次测量技术从训练好的模型中提取系统特性，形成代数学习框架（AgLr）。
AI.result: 验证了抽象代数在AI建模中的核心价值，为可解释信息建模提供了理论框架，揭示了深度学习与数学结构结合的新路径。
AI.conclusion: 代数学习通过数学约束与后验分析相结合，为构建可解释AI系统提供了新范式，未来可进一步探索其在科学发现中的应用潜力。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 代数学习通过数学约束与后验分析相结合，为构建可解释AI系统提供了新范式，未来可进一步探索其在科学发现中的应用潜力。

search_text: Algebraic Learning: Towards Interpretable Information Modeling 代数学习：走向可解释的信息模型 Along with the proliferation of digital data collected using sensor technologies and a boost of computing power, Deep Learning (DL) based approaches have drawn enormous attention in the past decade due to their impressive performance in extracting complex relations from raw data and representing valuable information. Meanwhile, though, rooted in its notorious black-box nature, the appreciation of DL has been highly debated due to the lack of interpretability. On the one hand, DL only utilizes statistical features contained in raw data while ignoring human knowledge of the underlying system, which results in both data inefficiency and trust issues; on the other hand, a trained DL model does not provide to researchers any extra insight about the underlying system beyond its output, which, however, is the essence of most fields of science, e.g. physics and economics. This thesis addresses the issue of interpretability in general information modeling and endeavors to ease the problem from two scopes. Firstly, a problem-oriented perspective is applied to incorporate knowledge into modeling practice, where interesting mathematical properties emerge naturally which cast constraints on modeling. Secondly, given a trained model, various methods could be applied to extract further insights about the underlying system. These two pathways are termed as guided model design and secondary measurements. Remarkably, a novel scheme emerges for the modeling practice in statistical learning: Algebraic Learning (AgLr). Instead of being restricted to the discussion of any specific model, AgLr starts from idiosyncrasies of a learning task itself and studies the structure of a legitimate model class. This novel scheme demonstrates the noteworthy value of abstract algebra for general AI, which has been overlooked in recent progress, and could shed further light on interpretable information modeling. 随着使用传感器技术收集的数字数据的激增和计算能力的提高，基于深度学习（DL）的方法在过去十年中因其在从原始数据中提取复杂关系和表示有价值信息方面的令人印象深刻的性能而引起了极大的关注。与此同时，由于深度学习臭名昭著的黑匣子性质，由于缺乏可解释性，深度学习的价值一直备受争议。一方面，深度学习仅利用原始数据中包含的统计特征，而忽略了人类对底层系统的了解，导致数据效率低下和信任问题；另一方面，经过训练的深度学习模型不会为研究人员提供除其输出之外的任何关于底层系统的额外见解，然而，这是大多数科学领域的本质，例如：物理学和经济学。本文解决了一般信息建模中的可解释性问题，并努力从两个范围来缓解该问题。首先，以问题为导向的视角将知识融入建模实践中，有趣的数学属性自然出现，对建模产生约束。其次，给定一个经过训练的模型，可以应用各种方法来提取有关底层系统的进一步见解。这两条途径被称为引导模型设计和二次测量。值得注意的是，统计学习中的建模实践出现了一种新颖的方案：代数学习（AgLr）。 AgLr 并不局限于对任何特定模型的讨论，而是从学习任务本身的特质出发，研究合法模型类的结构。这个新颖的方案展示了抽象代数对于通用人工智能的显着价值，这一点在最近的进展中被忽视了，并且可以进一步阐明可解释的信息模型。 本文提出代数学习（Algebraic Learning）方法，旨在解决深度学习在信息建模中的可解释性问题，通过结合数学结构约束和模型后分析提升模型的透明性与科学性。 Tong Owen Yang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Han Zhang,Zihao Zhang,Wenhao Zheng,Wei Xu
title: PNM: Pixel Null Model for General Image Segmentation
title_zh: PNM：用于一般图像分割的像素空模型
abstract: A major challenge in image segmentation is classifying object boundaries. Recent efforts propose to refine the segmentation result with boundary masks. However, models are still prone to misclassifying boundary pixels even when they correctly capture the object contours. In such cases, even a perfect boundary map is unhelpful for segmentation refinement. In this paper, we argue that assigning proper prior weights to error-prone pixels such as object boundaries can significantly improve the segmentation quality. Specifically, we present the \textit{pixel null model} (PNM), a prior model that weights each pixel according to its probability of being correctly classified by a random segmenter. Empirical analysis shows that PNM captures the misclassification distribution of different state-of-the-art (SOTA) segmenters. Extensive experiments on semantic, instance, and panoptic segmentation tasks over three datasets (Cityscapes, ADE20K, MS COCO) confirm that PNM consistently improves the segmentation quality of most SOTA methods (including the vision transformers) and outperforms boundary-based methods by a large margin. We also observe that the widely-used mean IoU (mIoU) metric is insensitive to boundaries of different sharpness. As a byproduct, we propose a new metric, \textit{PNM IoU}, which perceives the boundary sharpness and better reflects the model segmentation performance in error-prone regions.
summary: A major challenge in image segmentation is classifying object boundaries. Recent efforts propose to refine the segmentation result with boundary masks. However, models are still prone to misclassifying boundary pixels even when they correctly capture the object contours. In such cases, even a perfect boundary map is unhelpful for segmentation refinement. In this paper, we argue that assigning proper prior weights to error-prone pixels such as object boundaries can significantly improve the segmentation quality. Specifically, we present the \textit{pixel null model} (PNM), a prior model that weights each pixel according to its probability of being correctly classified by a random segmenter. Empirical analysis shows that PNM captures the misclassification distribution of different state-of-the-art (SOTA) segmenters. Extensive experiments on semantic, instance, and panoptic segmentation tasks over three datasets (Cityscapes, ADE20K, MS COCO) confirm that PNM consistently improves the segmentation quality of most SOTA methods (including the vision transformers) and outperforms boundary-based methods by a large margin. We also observe that the widely-used mean IoU (mIoU) metric is insensitive to boundaries of different sharpness. As a byproduct, we propose a new metric, \textit{PNM IoU}, which perceives the boundary sharpness and better reflects the model segmentation performance in error-prone regions.
abstract_zh: 图像分割的一个主要挑战是对对象边界进行分类。最近的努力建议使用边界掩模来细化分割结果。然而，即使模型正确捕获了对象轮廓，模型仍然容易对边界像素进行错误分类。在这种情况下，即使完美的边界图对于分割细化也无济于事。在本文中，我们认为为容易出错的像素（例如对象边界）分配适当的先验权重可以显着提高分割质量。具体来说，我们提出了 \textit{pixel null model} (PNM)，这是一种先验模型，根据随机分割器正确分类的概率对每个像素进行加权。实证分析表明，PNM 捕获了不同最先进 (SOTA) 分段器的错误分类分布。在三个数据集（Cityscapes、ADE20K、MS COCO）上对语义、实例和全景分割任务进行的广泛实验证实，PNM 持续提高了大多数 SOTA 方法（包括视觉转换器）的分割质量，并且大大优于基于边界的方法。我们还观察到广泛使用的平均 IoU (mIoU) 指标对不同清晰度的边界不敏感。作为副产品，我们提出了一个新的度量 \textit{PNM IoU}，它感知边界锐度并更好地反映易错区域中的模型分割性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为像素空模型（PNM）的先验模型，通过为易出错的像素（如物体边界）分配合理权重，提升图像分割质量。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法在正确捕捉物体轮廓时仍易误分类边界像素，导致边界掩膜无法有效优化分割结果，需通过先验权重改进误差区域的处理。
AI.method: 设计像素空模型（PNM），根据随机分割器正确分类每个像素的概率分配权重，通过实证分析验证其对不同先进分割器的误分类分布的捕捉能力。
AI.result: 在三个数据集（Cityscapes、ADE20K、MS COCO）的语义、实例和全景分割任务中，PNM显著提升多数先进方法（包括视觉Transformer）的分割质量，并优于基于边界的算法；同时提出感知边界锐度的PNM IoU指标。
AI.conclusion: PNM通过优化边界等易错区域的权重有效提升分割性能，且新指标PNM IoU能更准确反映模型在误差区域的表现。

authors_text: Thomas Mortier,Eyke Hüllermeier,Krzysztof Dembczyński,Willem Waegeman
title: Set-valued prediction in hierarchical classification with constrained representation complexity
title_zh: 具有约束表示复杂性的层次分类中的集值预测
abstract: Set-valued prediction is a well-known concept in multi-class classification. When a classifier is uncertain about the class label for a test instance, it can predict a set of classes instead of a single class. In this paper, we focus on hierarchical multi-class classification problems, where valid sets (typically) correspond to internal nodes of the hierarchy. We argue that this is a very strong restriction, and we propose a relaxation by introducing the notion of representation complexity for a predicted set. In combination with probabilistic classifiers, this leads to a challenging inference problem for which specific combinatorial optimization algorithms are needed. We propose three methods and evaluate them on benchmark datasets: a naïve approach that is based on matrix-vector multiplication, a reformulation as a knapsack problem with conflict graph, and a recursive tree search method. Experimental results demonstrate that the last method is computationally more efficient than the other two approaches, due to a hierarchical factorization of the conditional class distribution.
summary: Set-valued prediction is a well-known concept in multi-class classification. When a classifier is uncertain about the class label for a test instance, it can predict a set of classes instead of a single class. In this paper, we focus on hierarchical multi-class classification problems, where valid sets (typically) correspond to internal nodes of the hierarchy. We argue that this is a very strong restriction, and we propose a relaxation by introducing the notion of representation complexity for a predicted set. In combination with probabilistic classifiers, this leads to a challenging inference problem for which specific combinatorial optimization algorithms are needed. We propose three methods and evaluate them on benchmark datasets: a naïve approach that is based on matrix-vector multiplication, a reformulation as a knapsack problem with conflict graph, and a recursive tree search method. Experimental results demonstrate that the last method is computationally more efficient than the other two approaches, due to a hierarchical factorization of the conditional class distribution.
abstract_zh: 集值预测是多类分类中众所周知的概念。当分类器不确定测试实例的类标签时，它可以预测一组类而不是单个类。在本文中，我们关注层次多类分类问题，其中有效集（通常）对应于层次结构的内部节点。我们认为这是一个非常强的限制，并且我们提出通过引入预测集的表示复杂性的概念来放宽限制。与概率分类器相结合，这会导致一个具有挑战性的推理问题，需要特定的组合优化算法。我们提出了三种方法并在基准数据集上对其进行了评估：基于矩阵向量乘法的朴素方法、具有冲突图的背包问题的重新表述以及递归树搜索方法。实验结果表明，由于条件类分布的分层分解，最后一种方法在计算上比其他两种方法更有效。

AI.tldr: 在层次分类中，通过引入表示复杂度来放松传统集值预测限制，提出高效算法进行集值预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将有效集限制为层次结构的内部节点，限制了灵活性和预测准确性，需更高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：基于矩阵向量乘法的朴素方法、转化为带冲突图的背包问题、递归树搜索法，利用层次分解优化计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，递归树搜索法因层次分解条件类分布而计算效率优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新方法有效解决了层次分类中集值预测的计算效率问题，为相关应用提供更优解决方案。

search_text: Set-valued prediction in hierarchical classification with constrained representation complexity 具有约束表示复杂性的层次分类中的集值预测 Set-valued prediction is a well-known concept in multi-class classification. When a classifier is uncertain about the class label for a test instance, it can predict a set of classes instead of a single class. In this paper, we focus on hierarchical multi-class classification problems, where valid sets (typically) correspond to internal nodes of the hierarchy. We argue that this is a very strong restriction, and we propose a relaxation by introducing the notion of representation complexity for a predicted set. In combination with probabilistic classifiers, this leads to a challenging inference problem for which specific combinatorial optimization algorithms are needed. We propose three methods and evaluate them on benchmark datasets: a naïve approach that is based on matrix-vector multiplication, a reformulation as a knapsack problem with conflict graph, and a recursive tree search method. Experimental results demonstrate that the last method is computationally more efficient than the other two approaches, due to a hierarchical factorization of the conditional class distribution. 集值预测是多类分类中众所周知的概念。当分类器不确定测试实例的类标签时，它可以预测一组类而不是单个类。在本文中，我们关注层次多类分类问题，其中有效集（通常）对应于层次结构的内部节点。我们认为这是一个非常强的限制，并且我们提出通过引入预测集的表示复杂性的概念来放宽限制。与概率分类器相结合，这会导致一个具有挑战性的推理问题，需要特定的组合优化算法。我们提出了三种方法并在基准数据集上对其进行了评估：基于矩阵向量乘法的朴素方法、具有冲突图的背包问题的重新表述以及递归树搜索方法。实验结果表明，由于条件类分布的分层分解，最后一种方法在计算上比其他两种方法更有效。 在层次分类中，通过引入表示复杂度来放松传统集值预测限制，提出高效算法进行集值预测。 Thomas Mortier,Eyke Hüllermeier,Krzysztof Dembczyński,Willem Waegeman cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Seock-Hwan Noh,Jahyun Koo,Seunghyun Lee,Jongse Park,Jaeha Kung
title: FlexBlock: A Flexible DNN Training Accelerator with Multi-Mode Block Floating Point Support
title_zh: FlexBlock：具有多模式块浮点支持的灵活 DNN 训练加速器
abstract: Training deep neural networks (DNNs) is a computationally expensive job, which can take weeks or months even with high performance GPUs. As a remedy for this challenge, community has started exploring the use of more efficient data representations in the training process, e.g., block floating point (BFP). However, prior work on BFP-based DNN accelerators rely on a specific BFP representation making them less versatile. This paper builds upon an algorithmic observation that we can accelerate the training by leveraging multiple BFP precisions without compromising the finally achieved accuracy. Backed up by this algorithmic opportunity, we develop a flexible DNN training accelerator, dubbed FlexBlock, which supports three different BFP precision modes, possibly different among activation, weight, and gradient tensors. While several prior works proposed such multi-precision support for DNN accelerators, not only do they focus only on the inference, but also their core utilization is suboptimal at a fixed precision and specific layer types when the training is considered. Instead, FlexBlock is designed in such a way that high core utilization is achievable for i) various layer types, and ii) three BFP precisions by mapping data in a hierarchical manner to its compute units. We evaluate the effectiveness of FlexBlock architecture using well-known DNNs on CIFAR, ImageNet and WMT14 datasets. As a result, training in FlexBlock significantly improves the training speed by 1.5~5.3x and the energy efficiency by 2.4~7.0x on average compared to other training accelerators and incurs marginal accuracy loss compared to full-precision training.
summary: Training deep neural networks (DNNs) is a computationally expensive job, which can take weeks or months even with high performance GPUs. As a remedy for this challenge, community has started exploring the use of more efficient data representations in the training process, e.g., block floating point (BFP). However, prior work on BFP-based DNN accelerators rely on a specific BFP representation making them less versatile. This paper builds upon an algorithmic observation that we can accelerate the training by leveraging multiple BFP precisions without compromising the finally achieved accuracy. Backed up by this algorithmic opportunity, we develop a flexible DNN training accelerator, dubbed FlexBlock, which supports three different BFP precision modes, possibly different among activation, weight, and gradient tensors. While several prior works proposed such multi-precision support for DNN accelerators, not only do they focus only on the inference, but also their core utilization is suboptimal at a fixed precision and specific layer types when the training is considered. Instead, FlexBlock is designed in such a way that high core utilization is achievable for i) various layer types, and ii) three BFP precisions by mapping data in a hierarchical manner to its compute units. We evaluate the effectiveness of FlexBlock architecture using well-known DNNs on CIFAR, ImageNet and WMT14 datasets. As a result, training in FlexBlock significantly improves the training speed by 1.5~5.3x and the energy efficiency by 2.4~7.0x on average compared to other training accelerators and incurs marginal accuracy loss compared to full-precision training.
abstract_zh: 训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 是一项计算成本高昂的工作，即使使用高性能 GPU，也可能需要数周或数月的时间。作为应对这一挑战的补救措施，社区已经开始探索在训练过程中使用更有效的数据表示，例如块浮点（BFP）。然而，基于 BFP 的 DNN 加速器的先前工作依赖于特定的 BFP 表示，这使得它们的通用性较差。本文基于算法观察，我们可以通过利用多个 BFP 精度来加速训练，而不会影响最终达到的准确性。在此算法机会的支持下，我们开发了一个灵活的 DNN 训练加速器，称为 FlexBlock，它支持三种不同的 BFP 精度模式，激活、权重和梯度张量可能有所不同。虽然之前的一些工作提出了对 DNN 加速器的这种多精度支持，但它们不仅只关注推理，而且在考虑训练时，它们的核心利用率在固定精度和特定层类型下不是最优的。相反，FlexBlock 的设计方式是，通过以分层方式将数据映射到其计算单元，可实现 i) 各种层类型和 ii) 三种 BFP 精度的高核心利用率。我们使用著名的 DNN 在 CIFAR、ImageNet 和 WMT14 数据集上评估 FlexBlock 架构的有效性。因此，与其他训练加速器相比，FlexBlock 训练的训练速度平均显着提高了 1.5~5.3 倍，能源效率平均提高了 2.4~7.0 倍，并且与全精度训练相比，会产生边际精度损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlexBlock，一种支持多模式块浮点数（BFP）的灵活DNN训练加速器，旨在提升训练效率并保持精度。
AI.motivation: 传统DNN训练依赖高精度计算导致资源消耗大，而现有BFP加速器固定精度限制了灵活性，难以兼顾训练速度与精度。
AI.method: 设计FlexBlock支持三种BFP精度模式（激活值、权重、梯度可独立配置），通过分层数据映射实现不同层类型和精度下的高计算单元利用率。
AI.result: 在CIFAR、ImageNet和WMT14数据集上，FlexBlock相比其他加速器训练速度提升1.5~5.3倍，能效提升2.4~7.0倍，精度损失可忽略。
AI.conclusion: FlexBlock通过多模式BFP机制有效平衡了训练加速与精度需求，为高效DNN训练提供了灵活且高效的硬件解决方案。

authors_text: Chad DeChant,Daniel Bauer
title: Summarizing a virtual robot's past actions in natural language
title_zh: 用自然语言总结虚拟机器人过去的行为
abstract: We propose and demonstrate the task of giving natural language summaries of the actions of a robotic agent in a virtual environment. We explain why such a task is important, what makes it difficult, and discuss how it might be addressed. To encourage others to work on this, we show how a popular existing dataset that matches robot actions with natural language descriptions designed for an instruction following task can be repurposed to serve as a training ground for robot action summarization work. We propose and test several methods of learning to generate such summaries, starting from either egocentric video frames of the robot taking actions or intermediate text representations of the actions used by an automatic planner. We provide quantitative and qualitative evaluations of our results, which can serve as a baseline for future work.
summary: We propose and demonstrate the task of giving natural language summaries of the actions of a robotic agent in a virtual environment. We explain why such a task is important, what makes it difficult, and discuss how it might be addressed. To encourage others to work on this, we show how a popular existing dataset that matches robot actions with natural language descriptions designed for an instruction following task can be repurposed to serve as a training ground for robot action summarization work. We propose and test several methods of learning to generate such summaries, starting from either egocentric video frames of the robot taking actions or intermediate text representations of the actions used by an automatic planner. We provide quantitative and qualitative evaluations of our results, which can serve as a baseline for future work.
abstract_zh: 我们提出并演示了在虚拟环境中对机器人代理的行为提供自然语言摘要的任务。我们解释为什么这样的任务很重要，是什么让它变得困难，并讨论如何解决它。为了鼓励其他人从事这方面的工作，我们展示了如何将一个流行的现有数据集重新用作机器人动作总结工作的训练场，该数据集将机器人动作与专为指令跟踪任务设计的自然语言描述相匹配。我们提出并测试了几种学习生成此类摘要的方法，从机器人采取动作的以自我为中心的视频帧或自动规划器使用的动作的中间文本表示开始。我们对结果进行定量和定性评估，这可以作为未来工作的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并演示了对虚拟环境中机器人代理行为进行自然语言总结的任务。
AI.motivation: 该任务对于促进机器人行为理解与人机交互研究具有重要意义，但面临行为复杂性和语言表达准确性的挑战。
AI.method: 通过改造现有指令跟随数据集，利用机器人第一人称视频帧或自动规划器的中间文本表示，测试多种生成摘要的方法。
AI.result: 提供了定量和定性评估结果，为未来研究建立了基线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为机器人行为总结领域提供了可行方法和数据支持，推动了相关研究的发展。

authors_text: Yiping Kang,Ashish Mahendra,Christopher Clarke,Lingjia Tang,Jason Mars
title: Towards Personalized Intelligence at Scale
title_zh: 迈向大规模个性化智能
abstract: Personalized Intelligence (PI) is the problem of providing customized AI experiences tailored to each individual user. In many applications, PI is preferred or even required. Existing personalization approaches involve fine-tuning pre-trained models to create new customized models. However, these approaches require a significant amount of computation to train, scaling with model size and the number of users, inhibiting PI to be realized widely. In this work, we introduce a novel model architecture and training/inference framework to enable Personalized Intelligence at scale. We achieve this by attaching a Personalization Head (PH) to pre-trained language models (LM). During training, the base LMs are frozen and only the parameters in PH are updated and are unique per user. This results in significantly smaller overall model sizes and training cost than traditional fine-tuning approaches when scaled across many users. We evaluate PHs on academia and industry-focused datasets and show that the PHs outperform zeroshot baseline in F1 score and are significantly more scalable than traditional fine-tuning approaches. We identify key factors required for effective PH design and training.
summary: Personalized Intelligence (PI) is the problem of providing customized AI experiences tailored to each individual user. In many applications, PI is preferred or even required. Existing personalization approaches involve fine-tuning pre-trained models to create new customized models. However, these approaches require a significant amount of computation to train, scaling with model size and the number of users, inhibiting PI to be realized widely. In this work, we introduce a novel model architecture and training/inference framework to enable Personalized Intelligence at scale. We achieve this by attaching a Personalization Head (PH) to pre-trained language models (LM). During training, the base LMs are frozen and only the parameters in PH are updated and are unique per user. This results in significantly smaller overall model sizes and training cost than traditional fine-tuning approaches when scaled across many users. We evaluate PHs on academia and industry-focused datasets and show that the PHs outperform zeroshot baseline in F1 score and are significantly more scalable than traditional fine-tuning approaches. We identify key factors required for effective PH design and training.
abstract_zh: 个性化智能（PI）是为每个用户提供定制的人工智能体验的问题。在许多应用中，PI 是首选甚至是必需的。现有的个性化方法涉及微调预训练模型以创建新的定制模型。然而，这些方法需要大量的计算来训练，并随着模型大小和用户数量的增加而扩展，从而阻碍了 PI 的广泛实现。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的模型架构和训练/推理框架，以实现大规模的个性化智能。我们通过将个性化头（PH）附加到预训练的语言模型（LM）来实现这一点。在训练期间，基础 LM 被冻结，只有 PH 中的参数被更新，并且每个用户都是唯一的。当扩展到许多用户时，与传统的微调方法相比，这会导致整体模型大小和训练成本显着减小。我们在学术界和工业界的数据集上评估 PH，并表明 PH 在 F1 分数方面优于零样本基线，并且比传统的微调方法更具可扩展性。我们确定有效的 PH 设计和培训所需的关键因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型模型架构和训练框架，通过附加个性化头（PH）实现大规模个性化智能（PI），解决传统微调方法计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化方法需微调预训练模型，导致计算成本随模型规模和用户数量增加而显著上升，难以实现广泛应用。
AI.method: 在预训练语言模型基础上附加个性化头（PH），冻结基础模型参数，仅更新用户专属的PH参数，显著降低模型规模和训练成本。
AI.result: PH在学术与工业数据集上F1分数超越零样本基线，且相比传统微调方法具有更高的可扩展性，识别出PH设计与训练的关键影响因素。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了可扩展的个性化智能，为未来高效个性化AI系统提供了可行框架与设计指导。

search_text: Towards Personalized Intelligence at Scale 迈向大规模个性化智能 Personalized Intelligence (PI) is the problem of providing customized AI experiences tailored to each individual user. In many applications, PI is preferred or even required. Existing personalization approaches involve fine-tuning pre-trained models to create new customized models. However, these approaches require a significant amount of computation to train, scaling with model size and the number of users, inhibiting PI to be realized widely. In this work, we introduce a novel model architecture and training/inference framework to enable Personalized Intelligence at scale. We achieve this by attaching a Personalization Head (PH) to pre-trained language models (LM). During training, the base LMs are frozen and only the parameters in PH are updated and are unique per user. This results in significantly smaller overall model sizes and training cost than traditional fine-tuning approaches when scaled across many users. We evaluate PHs on academia and industry-focused datasets and show that the PHs outperform zeroshot baseline in F1 score and are significantly more scalable than traditional fine-tuning approaches. We identify key factors required for effective PH design and training. 个性化智能（PI）是为每个用户提供定制的人工智能体验的问题。在许多应用中，PI 是首选甚至是必需的。现有的个性化方法涉及微调预训练模型以创建新的定制模型。然而，这些方法需要大量的计算来训练，并随着模型大小和用户数量的增加而扩展，从而阻碍了 PI 的广泛实现。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的模型架构和训练/推理框架，以实现大规模的个性化智能。我们通过将个性化头（PH）附加到预训练的语言模型（LM）来实现这一点。在训练期间，基础 LM 被冻结，只有 PH 中的参数被更新，并且每个用户都是唯一的。当扩展到许多用户时，与传统的微调方法相比，这会导致整体模型大小和训练成本显着减小。我们在学术界和工业界的数据集上评估 PH，并表明 PH 在 F1 分数方面优于零样本基线，并且比传统的微调方法更具可扩展性。我们确定有效的 PH 设计和培训所需的关键因素。 本文提出一种新型模型架构和训练框架，通过附加个性化头（PH）实现大规模个性化智能（PI），解决传统微调方法计算成本高的问题。 Yiping Kang,Ashish Mahendra,Christopher Clarke,Lingjia Tang,Jason Mars cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Bin Li,Yixuan Weng,Bin Sun,Shutao Li
title: Towards Visual-Prompt Temporal Answering Grounding in Medical Instructional Video
title_zh: 迈向医学教学视频中的视觉提示时间回答接地
abstract: The temporal answering grounding in the video (TAGV) is a new task naturally derived from temporal sentence grounding in the video (TSGV). Given an untrimmed video and a text question, this task aims at locating the matching span from the video that can semantically answer the question. Existing methods tend to formulate the TAGV task with a visual span-based question answering (QA) approach by matching the visual frame span queried by the text question. However, due to the weak correlations and huge gaps of the semantic features between the textual question and visual answer, existing methods adopting visual span predictor perform poorly in the TAGV task. To bridge these gaps, we propose a visual-prompt text span localizing (VPTSL) method, which introduces the timestamped subtitles as a passage to perform the text span localization for the input text question, and prompts the visual highlight features into the pre-trained language model (PLM) for enhancing the joint semantic representations. Specifically, the context query attention is utilized to perform cross-modal interaction between the extracted textual and visual features. Then, the highlight features are obtained through the video-text highlighting for the visual prompt. To alleviate semantic differences between textual and visual features, we design the text span predictor by encoding the question, the subtitles, and the prompted visual highlight features with the PLM. As a result, the TAGV task is formulated to predict the span of subtitles matching the visual answer. Extensive experiments on the medical instructional dataset, namely MedVidQA, show that the proposed VPTSL outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) method by 28.36% in terms of mIOU with a large margin, which demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed visual prompt and the text span predictor.
summary: The temporal answering grounding in the video (TAGV) is a new task naturally derived from temporal sentence grounding in the video (TSGV). Given an untrimmed video and a text question, this task aims at locating the matching span from the video that can semantically answer the question. Existing methods tend to formulate the TAGV task with a visual span-based question answering (QA) approach by matching the visual frame span queried by the text question. However, due to the weak correlations and huge gaps of the semantic features between the textual question and visual answer, existing methods adopting visual span predictor perform poorly in the TAGV task. To bridge these gaps, we propose a visual-prompt text span localizing (VPTSL) method, which introduces the timestamped subtitles as a passage to perform the text span localization for the input text question, and prompts the visual highlight features into the pre-trained language model (PLM) for enhancing the joint semantic representations. Specifically, the context query attention is utilized to perform cross-modal interaction between the extracted textual and visual features. Then, the highlight features are obtained through the video-text highlighting for the visual prompt. To alleviate semantic differences between textual and visual features, we design the text span predictor by encoding the question, the subtitles, and the prompted visual highlight features with the PLM. As a result, the TAGV task is formulated to predict the span of subtitles matching the visual answer. Extensive experiments on the medical instructional dataset, namely MedVidQA, show that the proposed VPTSL outperforms the state-of-the-art (SOTA) method by 28.36% in terms of mIOU with a large margin, which demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed visual prompt and the text span predictor.
abstract_zh: 视频中的时间回答基础（TAGV）是从视频中的时间句子基础（TSGV）自然衍生出来的新任务。给定一个未修剪的视频和一个文本问题，该任务旨在从视频中定位可以在语义上回答问题的匹配范围。现有方法倾向于通过匹配文本问题查询的视觉帧跨度，使用基于视觉跨度的问答（QA）方法来制定 TAGV 任务。然而，由于文本问题和视觉答案之间语义特征的弱相关性和巨大差距，采用视觉跨度预测器的现有方法在TAGV任务中表现不佳。为了弥补这些差距，我们提出了一种视觉提示文本跨度定位（VPTSL）方法，该方法引入带时间戳的字幕作为对输入文本问题执行文本跨度定位的段落，并将视觉突出显示特征提示到预训练​​语言模型（PLM）中以增强联合语义表示。具体来说，上下文查询注意力用于在提取的文本和视觉特征之间执行跨模式交互。然后，通过视频文本突出显示来获得突出显示特征，用于视觉提示。为了减轻文本和视觉特征之间的语义差异，我们通过使用 PLM 对问题、字幕和提示的视觉突出显示特征进行编码来设计文本跨度预测器。因此，TAGV 任务被制定为预测与视觉答案匹配的字幕跨度。在医学教学数据集 MedVidQA 上的大量实验表明，所提出的 VPTSL 在 mIOU 方面比最先进的（SOTA）方法高出 28.36％，并且有很大的优势，这证明了所提出的视觉提示和文本跨度预测器的有效性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉提示的医疗教学视频中时序答案定位方法（VPTSL），旨在通过结合字幕和视觉特征来提高视频问答任务的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视频时序答案定位任务中因文本问题与视觉答案之间的语义差距较大，导致性能不佳，需寻找更有效的跨模态对齐方式。
AI.method: 引入时间戳字幕作为文本段落，利用预训练语言模型（PLM）进行文本跨度定位，并通过视觉高亮特征与文本特征的跨模态交互增强语义表示，设计文本跨度预测器实现答案定位。
AI.result: 在医疗教学数据集MedVidQA上，VPTSL方法在mIOU指标上比现有最优方法提升了28.36%。
AI.conclusion: 视觉提示与文本跨度预测器有效缩小了文本与视觉特征的语义差距，验证了该方法在医疗视频问答任务中的优越性。

authors_text: Chengpeng Dai,Fuhai Chen,Xiaoshuai Sun,Rongrong Ji,Qixiang Ye,Yongjian Wu
title: Global2Local: A Joint-Hierarchical Attention for Video Captioning
title_zh: Global2Local：视频字幕的联合分层关注
comment: The experiments and the comparisons are out of date. We will advance the framework and the algorithms with large changes
comments: The experiments and the comparisons are out of date. We will advance the framework and the algorithms with large changes
abstract: Recently, automatic video captioning has attracted increasing attention, where the core challenge lies in capturing the key semantic items, like objects and actions as well as their spatial-temporal correlations from the redundant frames and semantic content. To this end, existing works select either the key video clips in a global level~(across multi frames), or key regions within each frame, which, however, neglect the hierarchical order, i.e., key frames first and key regions latter. In this paper, we propose a novel joint-hierarchical attention model for video captioning, which embeds the key clips, the key frames and the key regions jointly into the captioning model in a hierarchical manner. Such a joint-hierarchical attention model first conducts a global selection to identify key frames, followed by a Gumbel sampling operation to identify further key regions based on the key frames, achieving an accurate global-to-local feature representation to guide the captioning. Extensive quantitative evaluations on two public benchmark datasets MSVD and MSR-VTT demonstrates the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Recently, automatic video captioning has attracted increasing attention, where the core challenge lies in capturing the key semantic items, like objects and actions as well as their spatial-temporal correlations from the redundant frames and semantic content. To this end, existing works select either the key video clips in a global level~(across multi frames), or key regions within each frame, which, however, neglect the hierarchical order, i.e., key frames first and key regions latter. In this paper, we propose a novel joint-hierarchical attention model for video captioning, which embeds the key clips, the key frames and the key regions jointly into the captioning model in a hierarchical manner. Such a joint-hierarchical attention model first conducts a global selection to identify key frames, followed by a Gumbel sampling operation to identify further key regions based on the key frames, achieving an accurate global-to-local feature representation to guide the captioning. Extensive quantitative evaluations on two public benchmark datasets MSVD and MSR-VTT demonstrates the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，自动视频字幕引起了越来越多的关注，其核心挑战在于从冗余帧和语义内容中捕获关键语义项，如对象和动作及其时空相关性。为此，现有的工作要么选择全局级别的关键视频片段（跨多帧），要么选择每帧内的关键区域，然而，它们忽略了层次顺序，即关键帧在前，关键区域在后。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的视频字幕联合分层注意力模型，它将关键片段、关键帧和关键区域以分层方式联合嵌入到字幕模型中。这种联合分层注意力模型首先进行全局选择来识别关键帧，然后进行 Gumbel 采样操作以基于关键帧识别进一步的关键区域，从而实现准确的全局到局部特征表示来指导字幕。对两个公共基准数据集 MSVD 和 MSR-VTT 的广泛定量评估证明了所提出的方法相对于最先进方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种联合分层注意力模型，用于视频字幕生成，以有效捕捉关键语义元素及其时空关联。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在全局或局部选择关键信息时忽略层次顺序，导致关键帧与关键区域的信息未能有效结合，影响字幕准确性。
AI.method: 采用联合分层注意力机制，首先通过全局选择确定关键帧，再利用Gumbel采样提取关键区域特征，实现从全局到局部的特征表示。
AI.result: 在MSVD和MSR-VTT数据集上的大量定量评估表明，该方法优于当前最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 联合分层注意力模型通过有效结合关键帧与关键区域信息，显著提升了视频字幕生成的准确性和语义连贯性。

search_text: Global2Local: A Joint-Hierarchical Attention for Video Captioning Global2Local：视频字幕的联合分层关注 Recently, automatic video captioning has attracted increasing attention, where the core challenge lies in capturing the key semantic items, like objects and actions as well as their spatial-temporal correlations from the redundant frames and semantic content. To this end, existing works select either the key video clips in a global level~(across multi frames), or key regions within each frame, which, however, neglect the hierarchical order, i.e., key frames first and key regions latter. In this paper, we propose a novel joint-hierarchical attention model for video captioning, which embeds the key clips, the key frames and the key regions jointly into the captioning model in a hierarchical manner. Such a joint-hierarchical attention model first conducts a global selection to identify key frames, followed by a Gumbel sampling operation to identify further key regions based on the key frames, achieving an accurate global-to-local feature representation to guide the captioning. Extensive quantitative evaluations on two public benchmark datasets MSVD and MSR-VTT demonstrates the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art methods. 最近，自动视频字幕引起了越来越多的关注，其核心挑战在于从冗余帧和语义内容中捕获关键语义项，如对象和动作及其时空相关性。为此，现有的工作要么选择全局级别的关键视频片段（跨多帧），要么选择每帧内的关键区域，然而，它们忽略了层次顺序，即关键帧在前，关键区域在后。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的视频字幕联合分层注意力模型，它将关键片段、关键帧和关键区域以分层方式联合嵌入到字幕模型中。这种联合分层注意力模型首先进行全局选择来识别关键帧，然后进行 Gumbel 采样操作以基于关键帧识别进一步的关键区域，从而实现准确的全局到局部特征表示来指导字幕。对两个公共基准数据集 MSVD 和 MSR-VTT 的广泛定量评估证明了所提出的方法相对于最先进方法的优越性。 提出一种联合分层注意力模型，用于视频字幕生成，以有效捕捉关键语义元素及其时空关联。 Chengpeng Dai,Fuhai Chen,Xiaoshuai Sun,Rongrong Ji,Qixiang Ye,Yongjian Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Kazuhisa Makino,Shuichi Miyazaki,Yu Yokoi
title: Incomplete List Setting of the Hospitals/Residents Problem with Maximally Satisfying Lower Quotas
title_zh: 最大限度满足较低配额的医院/居民名单设置不完整问题
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.03093
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.03093
abstract: To mitigate the imbalance in the number of assignees in the Hospitals/Residents problem, Goko et al. [Goko et al., Maximally Satisfying Lower Quotas in the Hospitals/Residents Problem with Ties, Proc. STACS 2022, pp. 31:1--31:20] studied the Hospitals/Residents problem with lower quotas whose goal is to find a stable matching that satisfies lower quotas as much as possible. In their paper, preference lists are assumed to be complete, that is, the preference list of each resident (resp., hospital) is assumed to contain all the hospitals (resp., residents). In this paper, we study a more general model where preference lists may be incomplete. For four natural scenarios, we obtain maximum gaps of the best and worst solutions, approximability results, and inapproximability results.
summary: To mitigate the imbalance in the number of assignees in the Hospitals/Residents problem, Goko et al. [Goko et al., Maximally Satisfying Lower Quotas in the Hospitals/Residents Problem with Ties, Proc. STACS 2022, pp. 31:1--31:20] studied the Hospitals/Residents problem with lower quotas whose goal is to find a stable matching that satisfies lower quotas as much as possible. In their paper, preference lists are assumed to be complete, that is, the preference list of each resident (resp., hospital) is assumed to contain all the hospitals (resp., residents). In this paper, we study a more general model where preference lists may be incomplete. For four natural scenarios, we obtain maximum gaps of the best and worst solutions, approximability results, and inapproximability results.
abstract_zh: 为了缓解医院/住院医师问题中指定人员数量不平衡的问题，Goko 等人。 [Goko 等人，最大限度地满足医院/居民关系问题中的较低配额，Proc。 STACS 2022，第 31:1--31:20] 研究了较低配额的医院/居民问题，其目标是找到尽可能满足较低配额的稳定匹配。在他们的论文中，假设偏好列表是完整的，即假设每个居民（分别是医院）的偏好列表包含所有医院（分别是居民）。在本文中，我们研究了一个更通用的模型，其中偏好列表可能不完整。对于四种自然场景，我们获得最佳和最差解决方案的最大差距、逼近性结果和不逼近性结果。

AI.tldr: 研究医院/居民匹配问题中偏好列表不完整时的最大化满足下限配额的稳定匹配方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设偏好列表完整，但实际场景中偏好列表可能不完整，需扩展模型以更贴近现实需求。
AI.method: 针对四种自然场景，分析最佳与最差解的最大差距，并探讨近似算法与不可近似性结果。
AI.result: 获得四种场景下的最大差距、近似算法有效性及不可近似性证明。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为不完整偏好列表下的稳定匹配问题提供了理论分析框架与算法设计依据。

authors_text: William Berrios,Arturo Deza
title: Joint rotational invariance and adversarial training of a dual-stream Transformer yields state of the art Brain-Score for Area V4
title_zh: 双流 Transformer 的联合旋转不变性和对抗性训练产生了 Area V4 的最先进的 Brain-Score
abstract: Modern high-scoring models of vision in the brain score competition do not stem from Vision Transformers. However, in this paper, we provide evidence against the unexpected trend of Vision Transformers (ViT) being not perceptually aligned with human visual representations by showing how a dual-stream Transformer, a CrossViT$~\textit{a la}$ Chen et al. (2021), under a joint rotationally-invariant and adversarial optimization procedure yields 2nd place in the aggregate Brain-Score 2022 competition(Schrimpf et al., 2020b) averaged across all visual categories, and at the time of the competition held 1st place for the highest explainable variance of area V4. In addition, our current Transformer-based model also achieves greater explainable variance for areas V4, IT and Behaviour than a biologically-inspired CNN (ResNet50) that integrates a frontal V1-like computation module (Dapello et al.,2020). To assess the contribution of the optimization scheme with respect to the CrossViT architecture, we perform several additional experiments on differently optimized CrossViT's regarding adversarial robustness, common corruption benchmarks, mid-ventral stimuli interpretation and feature inversion. Against our initial expectations, our family of results provides tentative support for an $\textit{"All roads lead to Rome"}$ argument enforced via a joint optimization rule even for non biologically-motivated models of vision such as Vision Transformers. Code is available at https://github.com/williamberrios/BrainScore-Transformers
summary: Modern high-scoring models of vision in the brain score competition do not stem from Vision Transformers. However, in this paper, we provide evidence against the unexpected trend of Vision Transformers (ViT) being not perceptually aligned with human visual representations by showing how a dual-stream Transformer, a CrossViT$~\textit{a la}$ Chen et al. (2021), under a joint rotationally-invariant and adversarial optimization procedure yields 2nd place in the aggregate Brain-Score 2022 competition(Schrimpf et al., 2020b) averaged across all visual categories, and at the time of the competition held 1st place for the highest explainable variance of area V4. In addition, our current Transformer-based model also achieves greater explainable variance for areas V4, IT and Behaviour than a biologically-inspired CNN (ResNet50) that integrates a frontal V1-like computation module (Dapello et al.,2020). To assess the contribution of the optimization scheme with respect to the CrossViT architecture, we perform several additional experiments on differently optimized CrossViT's regarding adversarial robustness, common corruption benchmarks, mid-ventral stimuli interpretation and feature inversion. Against our initial expectations, our family of results provides tentative support for an $\textit{"All roads lead to Rome"}$ argument enforced via a joint optimization rule even for non biologically-motivated models of vision such as Vision Transformers. Code is available at https://github.com/williamberrios/BrainScore-Transformers
abstract_zh: 现代大脑评分竞赛中的视觉高分模型并非源于视觉变形金刚。然而，在本文中，我们通过展示双流 Transformer（CrossViT$~\textit{a la}$ Chen 等人）如何在感知上与人类视觉表示不一致，提供了证据来证明视觉 Transformers (ViT) 的意外趋势。 (2021)，在联合旋转不变和对抗性优化程序下，在所有视觉类别的平均 Brain-Score 2022 竞赛中获得第二名（Schrimpf 等人，2020b），并且在竞赛时因 V4 区域的最高可解释方差而获得第一名。此外，与集成了类似 V1 的额叶计算模块的受生物学启发的 CNN (ResNet50) 相比，我们当前基于 Transformer 的模型还实现了 V4、IT 和行为领域更大的可解释方差（Dapello 等人，2020）。为了评估优化方案对 CrossViT 架构的贡献，我们对不同优化的 CrossViT 进行了一些额外的实验，涉及对抗鲁棒性、常见损坏基准、中腹刺激解释和特征反演。与我们最初的预期相反，我们的结果系列为通过联合优化规则强制执行的$\textit{“条条大路通罗马”}$论点提供了初步支持，即使对于非生物驱动的视觉模型（例如视觉变形金刚）也是如此。代码可在 https://github.com/williamberrios/BrainScore-Transformers 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双流Transformer模型，通过联合旋转不变性与对抗训练，在Brain-Score 2022竞赛中取得第二名，并在V4区域可解释方差上达到最高分。
AI.motivation: 挑战视觉Transformer（ViT）与人类视觉表征不匹配的假设，探索非生物启发模型通过优化策略实现高脑评分的可能性。
AI.method: 基于CrossViT架构设计双流Transformer，结合旋转不变性约束与对抗训练，对比不同优化方案在鲁棒性、干扰基准和特征逆向等任务上的表现。
AI.result: 模型在Brain-Score 2022竞赛中获得第二名，V4区域可解释方差超越生物启发CNN（ResNet50），并在多个基准测试中展现优越性。
AI.conclusion: 联合优化策略可使非生物启发模型（如ViT）达到与生物模型相当的性能，验证了'殊途同归'的优化有效性假设。

result: 模型在Brain-Score 2022竞赛中获得第二名，V4区域可解释方差超越生物启发CNN（ResNet50），并在多个基准测试中展现优越性。
conclusion: 联合优化策略可使非生物启发模型（如ViT）达到与生物模型相当的性能，验证了'殊途同归'的优化有效性假设。
search_text: Joint rotational invariance and adversarial training of a dual-stream Transformer yields state of the art Brain-Score for Area V4 双流 Transformer 的联合旋转不变性和对抗性训练产生了 Area V4 的最先进的 Brain-Score Modern high-scoring models of vision in the brain score competition do not stem from Vision Transformers. However, in this paper, we provide evidence against the unexpected trend of Vision Transformers (ViT) being not perceptually aligned with human visual representations by showing how a dual-stream Transformer, a CrossViT$~\textit{a la}$ Chen et al. (2021), under a joint rotationally-invariant and adversarial optimization procedure yields 2nd place in the aggregate Brain-Score 2022 competition(Schrimpf et al., 2020b) averaged across all visual categories, and at the time of the competition held 1st place for the highest explainable variance of area V4. In addition, our current Transformer-based model also achieves greater explainable variance for areas V4, IT and Behaviour than a biologically-inspired CNN (ResNet50) that integrates a frontal V1-like computation module (Dapello et al.,2020). To assess the contribution of the optimization scheme with respect to the CrossViT architecture, we perform several additional experiments on differently optimized CrossViT's regarding adversarial robustness, common corruption benchmarks, mid-ventral stimuli interpretation and feature inversion. Against our initial expectations, our family of results provides tentative support for an $\textit{"All roads lead to Rome"}$ argument enforced via a joint optimization rule even for non biologically-motivated models of vision such as Vision Transformers. Code is available at https://github.com/williamberrios/BrainScore-Transformers 现代大脑评分竞赛中的视觉高分模型并非源于视觉变形金刚。然而，在本文中，我们通过展示双流 Transformer（CrossViT$~\textit{a la}$ Chen 等人）如何在感知上与人类视觉表示不一致，提供了证据来证明视觉 Transformers (ViT) 的意外趋势。 (2021)，在联合旋转不变和对抗性优化程序下，在所有视觉类别的平均 Brain-Score 2022 竞赛中获得第二名（Schrimpf 等人，2020b），并且在竞赛时因 V4 区域的最高可解释方差而获得第一名。此外，与集成了类似 V1 的额叶计算模块的受生物学启发的 CNN (ResNet50) 相比，我们当前基于 Transformer 的模型还实现了 V4、IT 和行为领域更大的可解释方差（Dapello 等人，2020）。为了评估优化方案对 CrossViT 架构的贡献，我们对不同优化的 CrossViT 进行了一些额外的实验，涉及对抗鲁棒性、常见损坏基准、中腹刺激解释和特征反演。与我们最初的预期相反，我们的结果系列为通过联合优化规则强制执行的$\textit{“条条大路通罗马”}$论点提供了初步支持，即使对于非生物驱动的视觉模型（例如视觉变形金刚）也是如此。代码可在 https://github.com/williamberrios/BrainScore-Transformers 获取 本文提出一种双流Transformer模型，通过联合旋转不变性与对抗训练，在Brain-Score 2022竞赛中取得第二名，并在V4区域可解释方差上达到最高分。 William Berrios,Arturo Deza q-bio.NC,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Michal Kompan,Peter Gaspar,Jakub Macina,Matus Cimerman,Maria Bielikova
title: Exploring Customer Price Preference and Product Profit Role in Recommender Systems
title_zh: 探索客户价格偏好和产品利润在推荐系统中的作用
abstract: Most of the research in the recommender systems domain is focused on the optimization of the metrics based on historical data such as Mean Average Precision (MAP) or Recall. However, there is a gap between the research and industry since the leading Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for businesses are revenue and profit. In this paper, we explore the impact of manipulating the profit awareness of a recommender system. An average e-commerce business does not usually use a complicated recommender algorithm. We propose an adjustment of a predicted ranking for score-based recommender systems and explore the effect of the profit and customers' price preferences on two industry datasets from the fashion domain. In the experiments, we show the ability to improve both the precision and the generated recommendations' profit. Such an outcome represents a win-win situation when e-commerce increases the profit and customers get more valuable recommendations.
summary: Most of the research in the recommender systems domain is focused on the optimization of the metrics based on historical data such as Mean Average Precision (MAP) or Recall. However, there is a gap between the research and industry since the leading Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for businesses are revenue and profit. In this paper, we explore the impact of manipulating the profit awareness of a recommender system. An average e-commerce business does not usually use a complicated recommender algorithm. We propose an adjustment of a predicted ranking for score-based recommender systems and explore the effect of the profit and customers' price preferences on two industry datasets from the fashion domain. In the experiments, we show the ability to improve both the precision and the generated recommendations' profit. Such an outcome represents a win-win situation when e-commerce increases the profit and customers get more valuable recommendations.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统领域的大多数研究都集中在基于历史数据（例如平均精度（MAP）或召回率）的指标优化上。然而，研究与行业之间存在差距，因为企业的主要关键绩效指标 (KPI) 是收入和利润。在本文中，我们探讨了操纵推荐系统的利润意识的影响。一般的电子商务企业通常不会使用复杂的推荐算法。我们提出对基于分数的推荐系统的预测排名进行调整，并探讨利润和客户价格偏好对时尚领域两个行业数据集的影响。在实验中，我们展示了提高精度和生成的推荐利润的能力。当电子商务增加利润并且客户获得更有价值的推荐时，这样的结果代表了双赢的局面。

AI.tldr: 研究如何通过调整推荐系统以提升推荐精度与利润
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统研究侧重于精度指标，而企业更关注利润，需弥合这一差距
AI.method: 调整评分型推荐系统的预测排名，结合客户价格偏好与产品利润进行优化
AI.result: 实验表明，调整后的方法在提升推荐精度的同时增加了利润，实现双赢
AI.conclusion: 该方法为电商推荐系统提供了提升利润与推荐价值的有效途径

authors_text: Feiyu Wang,Qin Wang,Wen Li,Dong Xu,Luc Van Gool
title: Revisiting Deep Semi-supervised Learning: An Empirical Distribution Alignment Framework and Its Generalization Bound
title_zh: 重新审视深度半监督学习：经验分布对齐框架及其泛化界限
abstract: In this work, we revisit the semi-supervised learning (SSL) problem from a new perspective of explicitly reducing empirical distribution mismatch between labeled and unlabeled samples. Benefited from this new perspective, we first propose a new deep semi-supervised learning framework called Semi-supervised Learning by Empirical Distribution Alignment (SLEDA), in which existing technologies from the domain adaptation community can be readily used to address the semi-supervised learning problem through reducing the empirical distribution distance between labeled and unlabeled data. Based on this framework, we also develop a new theoretical generalization bound for the research community to better understand the semi-supervised learning problem, in which we show the generalization error of semi-supervised learning can be effectively bounded by minimizing the training error on labeled data and the empirical distribution distance between labeled and unlabeled data. Building upon our new framework and the theoretical bound, we develop a simple and effective deep semi-supervised learning method called Augmented Distribution Alignment Network (ADA-Net) by simultaneously adopting the well-established adversarial training strategy from the domain adaptation community and a simple sample interpolation strategy for data augmentation. Additionally, we incorporate both strategies in our ADA-Net into two exiting SSL methods to further improve their generalization capability, which indicates that our new framework provides a complementary solution for solving the SSL problem. Our comprehensive experimental results on two benchmark datasets SVHN and CIFAR-10 for the semi-supervised image recognition task and another two benchmark datasets ModelNet40 and ShapeNet55 for the semi-supervised point cloud recognition task demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework for SSL.
summary: In this work, we revisit the semi-supervised learning (SSL) problem from a new perspective of explicitly reducing empirical distribution mismatch between labeled and unlabeled samples. Benefited from this new perspective, we first propose a new deep semi-supervised learning framework called Semi-supervised Learning by Empirical Distribution Alignment (SLEDA), in which existing technologies from the domain adaptation community can be readily used to address the semi-supervised learning problem through reducing the empirical distribution distance between labeled and unlabeled data. Based on this framework, we also develop a new theoretical generalization bound for the research community to better understand the semi-supervised learning problem, in which we show the generalization error of semi-supervised learning can be effectively bounded by minimizing the training error on labeled data and the empirical distribution distance between labeled and unlabeled data. Building upon our new framework and the theoretical bound, we develop a simple and effective deep semi-supervised learning method called Augmented Distribution Alignment Network (ADA-Net) by simultaneously adopting the well-established adversarial training strategy from the domain adaptation community and a simple sample interpolation strategy for data augmentation. Additionally, we incorporate both strategies in our ADA-Net into two exiting SSL methods to further improve their generalization capability, which indicates that our new framework provides a complementary solution for solving the SSL problem. Our comprehensive experimental results on two benchmark datasets SVHN and CIFAR-10 for the semi-supervised image recognition task and another two benchmark datasets ModelNet40 and ShapeNet55 for the semi-supervised point cloud recognition task demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework for SSL.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们从明确减少标记和未标记样本之间的经验分布不匹配的新角度重新审视半监督学习（SSL）问题。受益于这个新视角，我们首先提出了一种新的深度半监督学习框架，称为经验分布对齐半监督学习（SLEDA），其中领域适应社区的现有技术可以通过减少标记和未标记数据之间的经验分布距离来轻松地使用领域适应社区的现有技术来解决半监督学习问题。基于这个框架，我们还为研究界开发了一个新的理论泛化界限，以更好地理解半监督学习问题，其中我们表明，通过最小化标记数据上的训练误差以及标记和未标记数据之间的经验分布距离，可以有效地限制半监督学习的泛化误差。基于我们的新框架和理论界限，我们通过同时采用领域适应社区成熟的对抗性训练策略和用于数据增强的简单样本插值策略，开发了一种简单有效的深度半监督学习方法，称为增强分布对齐网络（ADA-Net）。此外，我们将 ADA-Net 中的两种策略合并到两种现有的 SSL 方法中，以进一步提高它们的泛化能力，这表明我们的新框架为解决 SSL 问题提供了补充解决方案。我们在用于半监督图像识别任务的两个基准数据集 SVHN 和 CIFAR-10 以及用于半监督点云识别任务的另外两个基准数据集 ModelNet40 和 ShapeNet55 上的综合实验结果证明了我们提出的 SSL 框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的深度半监督学习框架SLEDA及方法ADA-Net，通过对齐标签数据与未标签数据的分布来提升半监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法未能充分解决标签数据与未标签数据之间的经验分布差异问题，导致模型泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 基于领域自适应技术，提出SLEDA框架并开发ADA-Net方法，结合对抗训练与样本插值策略，同时将策略融入现有SSL方法以增强泛化能力。
AI.result: 在SVHN、CIFAR-10、ModelNet40和ShapeNet55数据集上的实验验证了框架有效性，显著提升半监督图像和点云识别任务性能。
AI.conclusion: SLEDA框架为半监督学习提供了互补性解决方案，理论界定了泛化误差上界，实践证明其方法在多任务场景中具有广泛适用性。

Additionally, we incorporate both strategies in our ADA-Net into two exiting SSL methods to further improve their generalization capability, which indicates that our new framework provides a complementary solution for solving the SSL problem. Our comprehensive experimental results on two benchmark datasets SVHN and CIFAR-10 for the semi-supervised image recognition task and another two benchmark datasets ModelNet40 and ShapeNet55 for the semi-supervised point cloud recognition task demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework for SSL. 在这项工作中，我们从明确减少标记和未标记样本之间的经验分布不匹配的新角度重新审视半监督学习（SSL）问题。受益于这个新视角，我们首先提出了一种新的深度半监督学习框架，称为经验分布对齐半监督学习（SLEDA），其中领域适应社区的现有技术可以通过减少标记和未标记数据之间的经验分布距离来轻松地使用领域适应社区的现有技术来解决半监督学习问题。基于这个框架，我们还为研究界开发了一个新的理论泛化界限，以更好地理解半监督学习问题，其中我们表明，通过最小化标记数据上的训练误差以及标记和未标记数据之间的经验分布距离，可以有效地限制半监督学习的泛化误差。基于我们的新框架和理论界限，我们通过同时采用领域适应社区成熟的对抗性训练策略和用于数据增强的简单样本插值策略，开发了一种简单有效的深度半监督学习方法，称为增强分布对齐网络（ADA-Net）。此外，我们将 ADA-Net 中的两种策略合并到两种现有的 SSL 方法中，以进一步提高它们的泛化能力，这表明我们的新框架为解决 SSL 问题提供了补充解决方案。我们在用于半监督图像识别任务的两个基准数据集 SVHN 和 CIFAR-10 以及用于半监督点云识别任务的另外两个基准数据集 ModelNet40 和 ShapeNet55 上的综合实验结果证明了我们提出的 SSL 框架的有效性。 本文提出了一种新的深度半监督学习框架SLEDA及方法ADA-Net，通过对齐标签数据与未标签数据的分布来提升半监督学习效果。 Feiyu Wang,Qin Wang,Wen Li,Dong Xu,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Alessandra Rossi,Maria Di Maro,Antonio Origlia,Agostino Palmiero,Silvia Rossi
title: A ROS Architecture for Personalised HRI with a Bartender Social Robot
title_zh: 带有调酒师社交机器人的个性化 HRI ROS 架构

abstract: BRILLO (Bartending Robot for Interactive Long-Lasting Operations) project has the overall goal of creating an autonomous robotic bartender that can interact with customers while accomplishing its bartending tasks. In such a scenario, people's novelty effect connected to the use of an attractive technology is destined to wear off and, consequently, it negatively affects the success of the service robotics application. For this reason, providing personalised natural interaction while accessing its services is of paramount importance for increasing users' engagement and, consequently, their loyalty. In this paper, we present the developed three-layers ROS architecture integrating a perception layer managing the processing of different social signals, a decision-making layer for handling multi-party interactions, and an execution layer controlling the behaviour of a complex robot composed of arms and a face. Finally, user modelling through a beliefs layer allows for personalised interaction.
summary: BRILLO (Bartending Robot for Interactive Long-Lasting Operations) project has the overall goal of creating an autonomous robotic bartender that can interact with customers while accomplishing its bartending tasks. In such a scenario, people's novelty effect connected to the use of an attractive technology is destined to wear off and, consequently, it negatively affects the success of the service robotics application. For this reason, providing personalised natural interaction while accessing its services is of paramount importance for increasing users' engagement and, consequently, their loyalty. In this paper, we present the developed three-layers ROS architecture integrating a perception layer managing the processing of different social signals, a decision-making layer for handling multi-party interactions, and an execution layer controlling the behaviour of a complex robot composed of arms and a face. Finally, user modelling through a beliefs layer allows for personalised interaction.
abstract_zh: BRILLO（交互式持久操作调酒机器人）项目的总体目标是创建一个自主机器人调酒师，可以在完成调酒任务的同时与顾客互动。在这种情况下，人们与使用有吸引力的技术相关的新奇效应注定会消失，从而对服务机器人应用的成功产生负面影响。因此，在访问其服务时提供个性化的自然交互对于提高用户的参与度以及忠诚度至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了开发的三层ROS架构，集成了管理不同社交信号处理的感知层、处理多方交互的决策层以及控制由手臂和面部组成的复杂机器人的行为的执行层。最后，通过信念层进行用户建模可以实现个性化交互。

AI.tldr: 设计一个三层ROS架构，实现调酒师社交机器人的个性化人机交互
AI.motivation: 用户对新技术的新奇感会消退，影响服务机器人应用效果，需通过个性化交互提升用户参与度和忠诚度
AI.method: 提出三层ROS架构（感知层、决策层、执行层）及信念层用户建模，实现个性化交互
AI.result: 实现个性化人机交互，提升用户参与度和忠诚度
AI.conclusion: 该架构有效支持个性化人机交互，为服务机器人应用提供可行方案

authors_text: Nico Messikommer,Stamatios Georgoulis,Daniel Gehrig,Stepan Tulyakov,Julius Erbach,Alfredo Bochicchio,Yuanyou Li,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Multi-Bracket High Dynamic Range Imaging with Event Cameras
title_zh: 使用事件相机进行多支架高动态范围成像
comment: ef:IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshop (CVPRW), New Orleans, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshop (CVPRW), New Orleans, 2022
abstract: Modern high dynamic range (HDR) imaging pipelines align and fuse multiple low dynamic range (LDR) images captured at different exposure times. While these methods work well in static scenes, dynamic scenes remain a challenge since the LDR images still suffer from saturation and noise. In such scenarios, event cameras would be a valid complement, thanks to their higher temporal resolution and dynamic range. In this paper, we propose the first multi-bracket HDR pipeline combining a standard camera with an event camera. Our results show better overall robustness when using events, with improvements in PSNR by up to 5dB on synthetic data and up to 0.7dB on real-world data. We also introduce a new dataset containing bracketed LDR images with aligned events and HDR ground truth.
summary: Modern high dynamic range (HDR) imaging pipelines align and fuse multiple low dynamic range (LDR) images captured at different exposure times. While these methods work well in static scenes, dynamic scenes remain a challenge since the LDR images still suffer from saturation and noise. In such scenarios, event cameras would be a valid complement, thanks to their higher temporal resolution and dynamic range. In this paper, we propose the first multi-bracket HDR pipeline combining a standard camera with an event camera. Our results show better overall robustness when using events, with improvements in PSNR by up to 5dB on synthetic data and up to 0.7dB on real-world data. We also introduce a new dataset containing bracketed LDR images with aligned events and HDR ground truth.
abstract_zh: 现代高动态范围 (HDR) 成像管道对齐并融合在不同曝光时间捕获的多个低动态范围 (LDR) 图像。虽然这些方法在静态场景中效果很好，但动态场景仍然是一个挑战，因为 LDR 图像仍然存在饱和度和噪声。在这种情况下，事件相机将是一个有效的补充，因为它们具有更高的时间分辨率和动态范围。在本文中，我们提出了第一个将标准相机与事件相机相结合的多支架 HDR 管道。我们的结果显示，使用事件时整体鲁棒性更好，合成数据的 PSNR 提高了 5dB，真实数据的 PSNR 提高了 0.7dB。我们还引入了一个新的数据集，其中包含带有对齐事件和 HDR 地面实况的括号内的 LDR 图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合标准相机与事件相机的多曝光高动态范围（HDR）成像方法，以解决动态场景中的饱和与噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 传统HDR方法在动态场景中因图像饱和和噪声难以有效工作，而事件相机具有更高的时间分辨率和动态范围，可作为补充。
AI.method: 设计首个融合标准相机多曝光图像与事件相机数据的HDR流水线，通过对齐和融合两种数据源生成更鲁棒的HDR图像。
AI.result: 合成数据PSNR提升最高5dB，真实场景提升0.7dB，并发布包含对齐事件与HDR真值的新数据集。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机与标准相机的结合显著提升了动态场景HDR成像的鲁棒性，为后续研究提供了新数据支持。

authors_text: Xiaojun Jia,Yong Zhang,Baoyuan Wu,Ke Ma,Jue Wang,Xiaochun Cao
title: LAS-AT: Adversarial Training with Learnable Attack Strategy
title_zh: LAS-AT：具有可学习攻击策略的对抗训练
abstract: Adversarial training (AT) is always formulated as a minimax problem, of which the performance depends on the inner optimization that involves the generation of adversarial examples (AEs). Most previous methods adopt Projected Gradient Decent (PGD) with manually specifying attack parameters for AE generation. A combination of the attack parameters can be referred to as an attack strategy. Several works have revealed that using a fixed attack strategy to generate AEs during the whole training phase limits the model robustness and propose to exploit different attack strategies at different training stages to improve robustness. But those multi-stage hand-crafted attack strategies need much domain expertise, and the robustness improvement is limited. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for adversarial training by introducing the concept of "learnable attack strategy", dubbed LAS-AT, which learns to automatically produce attack strategies to improve the model robustness. Our framework is composed of a target network that uses AEs for training to improve robustness and a strategy network that produces attack strategies to control the AE generation. Experimental evaluations on three benchmark databases demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method. The code is released at https://github.com/jiaxiaojunQAQ/LAS-AT.
summary: Adversarial training (AT) is always formulated as a minimax problem, of which the performance depends on the inner optimization that involves the generation of adversarial examples (AEs). Most previous methods adopt Projected Gradient Decent (PGD) with manually specifying attack parameters for AE generation. A combination of the attack parameters can be referred to as an attack strategy. Several works have revealed that using a fixed attack strategy to generate AEs during the whole training phase limits the model robustness and propose to exploit different attack strategies at different training stages to improve robustness. But those multi-stage hand-crafted attack strategies need much domain expertise, and the robustness improvement is limited. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for adversarial training by introducing the concept of "learnable attack strategy", dubbed LAS-AT, which learns to automatically produce attack strategies to improve the model robustness. Our framework is composed of a target network that uses AEs for training to improve robustness and a strategy network that produces attack strategies to control the AE generation. Experimental evaluations on three benchmark databases demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method. The code is released at https://github.com/jiaxiaojunQAQ/LAS-AT.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练（AT）始终被表述为极小极大问题，其性能取决于涉及生成对抗性示例（AE）的内部优化。以前的方法大多数采用投影梯度下降（PGD）并手动指定AE生成的攻击参数。攻击参数的组合可以称为攻击策略。一些工作表明，在整个训练阶段使用固定的攻击策略来生成AE会限制模型的鲁棒性，并提出在不同的训练阶段利用不同的攻击策略来提高鲁棒性。但这些多阶段的手工攻击策略需要大量的领域专业知识，并且鲁棒性的提高有限。在本文中，我们通过引入“可学习攻击策略”的概念，提出了一种新颖的对抗训练框架，称为 LAS-AT，它学习自动生成攻击策略以提高模型的鲁棒性。我们的框架由一个使用 AE 进行训练以提高鲁棒性的目标网络和一个生成攻击策略来控制 AE 生成的策略网络组成。对三个基准数据库的实验评估证明了该方法的优越性。代码发布于https://github.com/jiaxiaojunQAQ/LAS-AT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LAS-AT的对抗训练框架，通过引入可学习的攻击策略自动生成对抗样本，以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗训练依赖人工设定的固定攻击策略（如PGD），导致模型鲁棒性受限；多阶段手工策略需大量领域知识且改进有限。
AI.method: 框架包含目标网络（用于对抗样本训练）和策略网络（自动生成攻击参数），通过联合优化实现攻击策略的自动学习。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在模型鲁棒性上优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 可学习攻击策略能自动适应训练过程，无需人工干预即可提升模型对抗能力，为对抗训练提供新思路。

search_text: LAS-AT: Adversarial Training with Learnable Attack Strategy LAS-AT：具有可学习攻击策略的对抗训练 Adversarial training (AT) is always formulated as a minimax problem, of which the performance depends on the inner optimization that involves the generation of adversarial examples (AEs). Most previous methods adopt Projected Gradient Decent (PGD) with manually specifying attack parameters for AE generation. A combination of the attack parameters can be referred to as an attack strategy. Several works have revealed that using a fixed attack strategy to generate AEs during the whole training phase limits the model robustness and propose to exploit different attack strategies at different training stages to improve robustness. But those multi-stage hand-crafted attack strategies need much domain expertise, and the robustness improvement is limited. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for adversarial training by introducing the concept of "learnable attack strategy", dubbed LAS-AT, which learns to automatically produce attack strategies to improve the model robustness. Our framework is composed of a target network that uses AEs for training to improve robustness and a strategy network that produces attack strategies to control the AE generation. Experimental evaluations on three benchmark databases demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method. The code is released at https://github.com/jiaxiaojunQAQ/LAS-AT. 对抗性训练（AT）始终被表述为极小极大问题，其性能取决于涉及生成对抗性示例（AE）的内部优化。以前的方法大多数采用投影梯度下降（PGD）并手动指定AE生成的攻击参数。攻击参数的组合可以称为攻击策略。一些工作表明，在整个训练阶段使用固定的攻击策略来生成AE会限制模型的鲁棒性，并提出在不同的训练阶段利用不同的攻击策略来提高鲁棒性。但这些多阶段的手工攻击策略需要大量的领域专业知识，并且鲁棒性的提高有限。在本文中，我们通过引入“可学习攻击策略”的概念，提出了一种新颖的对抗训练框架，称为 LAS-AT，它学习自动生成攻击策略以提高模型的鲁棒性。我们的框架由一个使用 AE 进行训练以提高鲁棒性的目标网络和一个生成攻击策略来控制 AE 生成的策略网络组成。对三个基准数据库的实验评估证明了该方法的优越性。代码发布于https://github.com/jiaxiaojunQAQ/LAS-AT。 本文提出一种名为LAS-AT的对抗训练框架，通过引入可学习的攻击策略自动生成对抗样本，以提升模型鲁棒性。 Xiaojun Jia,Yong Zhang,Baoyuan Wu,Ke Ma,Jue Wang,Xiaochun Cao cs.CV

authors_text: Hyungtae Lim,Suyong Yeon,Soohyun Ryu,Yonghan Lee,Youngji Kim,Jaeseong Yun,Euigon Jung,Donghwan Lee,Hyun Myung
title: A Single Correspondence Is Enough: Robust Global Registration to Avoid Degeneracy in Urban Environments
title_zh: 单一通信就足够了：强大的全球注册以避免城市环境退化
abstract: Global registration using 3D point clouds is a crucial technology for mobile platforms to achieve localization or manage loop-closing situations. In recent years, numerous researchers have proposed global registration methods to address a large number of outlier correspondences. Unfortunately, the degeneracy problem, which represents the phenomenon in which the number of estimated inliers becomes lower than three, is still potentially inevitable. To tackle the problem, a degeneracy-robust decoupling-based global registration method is proposed, called Quatro. In particular, our method employs quasi-SO(3) estimation by leveraging the Atlanta world assumption in urban environments to avoid degeneracy in rotation estimation. Thus, the minimum degree of freedom (DoF) of our method is reduced from three to one. As verified in indoor and outdoor 3D LiDAR datasets, our proposed method yields robust global registration performance compared with other global registration methods, even for distant point cloud pairs. Furthermore, the experimental results confirm the applicability of our method as a coarse alignment. Our code is available: https://github.com/url-kaist/quatro.
summary: Global registration using 3D point clouds is a crucial technology for mobile platforms to achieve localization or manage loop-closing situations. In recent years, numerous researchers have proposed global registration methods to address a large number of outlier correspondences. Unfortunately, the degeneracy problem, which represents the phenomenon in which the number of estimated inliers becomes lower than three, is still potentially inevitable. To tackle the problem, a degeneracy-robust decoupling-based global registration method is proposed, called Quatro. In particular, our method employs quasi-SO(3) estimation by leveraging the Atlanta world assumption in urban environments to avoid degeneracy in rotation estimation. Thus, the minimum degree of freedom (DoF) of our method is reduced from three to one. As verified in indoor and outdoor 3D LiDAR datasets, our proposed method yields robust global registration performance compared with other global registration methods, even for distant point cloud pairs. Furthermore, the experimental results confirm the applicability of our method as a coarse alignment. Our code is available: https://github.com/url-kaist/quatro.
abstract_zh: 使用 3D 点云的全局配准是移动平台实现本地化或管理闭环情况的关键技术。近年来，许多研究人员提出了全局配准方法来解决大量异常值对应问题。不幸的是，简并问题（代表估计的内点数量低于三个的现象）仍然是不可避免的。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种基于简并鲁棒解耦的全局配准方法，称为 Quatro。特别是，我们的方法通过利用城市环境中的亚特兰大世界假设来采用准 SO(3) 估计，以避免旋转估计的简并性。因此，我们方法的最小自由度 (DoF) 从 3 减少到 1。正如在室内和室外 3D LiDAR 数据集中所验证的那样，与其他全局配准方法相比，我们提出的方法即使对于遥远的点云对也能产生强大的全局配准性能。此外，实验结果证实了我们的方法作为粗对准的适用性。我们的代码可用：https://github.com/url-kaist/quatro。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Quatro的鲁棒全局配准方法，通过减少自由度来避免城市环境中因退化问题导致的配准失败。
AI.motivation: 现有全局配准方法在处理大量异常值时易出现退化问题（即估计的内点数低于3个），导致配准失败，需解决此问题以提升城市环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于亚特兰大世界假设，采用准SO(3)旋转估计，将自由度从3降至1，并通过解耦策略实现退化鲁棒的全局配准。
AI.result: 在室内外3D LiDAR数据集上验证，Quatro在远距离点云配准中表现优于其他方法，且可作为粗配准方案应用。
AI.conclusion: Quatro通过降低自由度和利用城市环境先验有效避免退化，为复杂场景下的全局配准提供了可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Dengshan Li,Rujing Wang
title: Context-LSTM: a robust classifier for video detection on UCF101
title_zh: Context-LSTM：UCF101 上用于视频检测的鲁棒分类器
abstract: Video detection and human action recognition may be computationally expensive, and need a long time to train models. In this paper, we were intended to reduce the training time and the GPU memory usage of video detection, and achieved a competitive detection accuracy. Other research works such as Two-stream, C3D, TSN have shown excellent performance on UCF101. Here, we used a LSTM structure simply for video detection. We used a simple structure to perform a competitive top-1 accuracy on the entire validation dataset of UCF101. The LSTM structure is named Context-LSTM, since it may process the deep temporal features. The Context-LSTM may simulate the human recognition system. We cascaded the LSTM blocks in PyTorch and connected the cell state flow and hidden output flow. At the connection of the blocks, we used ReLU, Batch Normalization, and MaxPooling functions. The Context-LSTM could reduce the training time and the GPU memory usage, while keeping a state-of-the-art top-1 accuracy on UCF101 entire validation dataset, show a robust performance on video action detection.
summary: Video detection and human action recognition may be computationally expensive, and need a long time to train models. In this paper, we were intended to reduce the training time and the GPU memory usage of video detection, and achieved a competitive detection accuracy. Other research works such as Two-stream, C3D, TSN have shown excellent performance on UCF101. Here, we used a LSTM structure simply for video detection. We used a simple structure to perform a competitive top-1 accuracy on the entire validation dataset of UCF101. The LSTM structure is named Context-LSTM, since it may process the deep temporal features. The Context-LSTM may simulate the human recognition system. We cascaded the LSTM blocks in PyTorch and connected the cell state flow and hidden output flow. At the connection of the blocks, we used ReLU, Batch Normalization, and MaxPooling functions. The Context-LSTM could reduce the training time and the GPU memory usage, while keeping a state-of-the-art top-1 accuracy on UCF101 entire validation dataset, show a robust performance on video action detection.
abstract_zh: 视频检测和人体动作识别的计算成本可能很高，并且需要很长时间来训练模型。在本文中，我们的目的是减少视频检测的训练时间和 GPU 内存使用量，并实现有竞争力的检测精度。其他研究工作如Two-stream、C3D、TSN在UCF101上也表现出了优异的性能。在这里，我们仅使用 LSTM 结构进行视频检测。我们使用简单的结构在 UCF101 的整个验证数据集上实现了具有竞争力的 top-1 准确率。 LSTM结构被命名为Context-LSTM，因为它可以处理深层时间特征。 Context-LSTM可以模拟人类识别系统。我们在 PyTorch 中级联 LSTM 模块，并连接单元状态流和隐藏输出流。在块的连接处，我们使用了 ReLU、Batch Normalization 和 MaxPooling 函数。 Context-LSTM 可以减少训练时间和 GPU 内存使用量，同时在 UCF101 整个验证数据集上保持最先进的 top-1 精度，在视频动作检测方面表现出强大的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Context-LSTM的长短期记忆网络结构，用于在UCF101数据集上实现高效的视频动作检测。
AI.motivation: 现有视频检测方法（如Two-stream、C3D、TSN）虽性能优异，但存在训练耗时长、GPU内存占用高的问题，需寻找更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计Context-LSTM结构，通过级联LSTM模块并连接细胞状态流与隐藏输出流，结合ReLU、批量归一化和最大池化操作，以处理深度时序特征并降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在UCF101验证集上达到与现有方法相当的top-1准确率，同时显著减少训练时间和GPU内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: Context-LSTM通过模拟人类视觉系统的时间感知机制，在保证检测精度的同时提升了视频动作识别的计算效率，是一种鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Mustain Billah,Md. Mynoddin,Mostafijur Rahman Akhond,Md. Nasim Adnan,Syed Md. Galib,Rizwanur Rahad,M Nurujjaman Khan
title: A Systematic Study and Analysis of Bengali Folklore with Natural Language Processing Systems
title_zh: 利用自然语言处理系统对孟加拉民俗进行系统研究与分析
abstract: Folklore, a solid branch of folk literature, is the hallmark of any nation or any society. Such as oral tradition; as proverbs or jokes, it also includes material culture as well as traditional folk beliefs, and various customs. Bengali folklore is as rich in-depth as it is amazing. Nevertheless, in the womb of time, it is determined to sustain its existence. Therefore, our aim in this study is to make our rich folklore more comprehensible to everyone in a more sophisticated computational way. Some studies concluded various aspects of the Bengali language with NLP. Our proposed model is to be specific for Bengali folklore. Technically, it will be the first step towards Bengali natural language processing for studying and analyzing the folklore of Bengal.
summary: Folklore, a solid branch of folk literature, is the hallmark of any nation or any society. Such as oral tradition; as proverbs or jokes, it also includes material culture as well as traditional folk beliefs, and various customs. Bengali folklore is as rich in-depth as it is amazing. Nevertheless, in the womb of time, it is determined to sustain its existence. Therefore, our aim in this study is to make our rich folklore more comprehensible to everyone in a more sophisticated computational way. Some studies concluded various aspects of the Bengali language with NLP. Our proposed model is to be specific for Bengali folklore. Technically, it will be the first step towards Bengali natural language processing for studying and analyzing the folklore of Bengal.
abstract_zh: 民间文学艺术是民间文学的一个重要分支，是任何民族、任何社会的标志。例如口头传统；作为谚语或笑话，它还包括物质文化以及传统的民间信仰和各种习俗。孟加拉的民间传说既丰富又深刻，令人惊叹。然而，在时间的子宫里，它决心维持它的存在。因此，我们这项研究的目的是通过更复杂的计算方式让每个人都更容易理解我们丰富的民间传说。一些研究通过 NLP 总结了孟加拉语的各个方面。我们提出的模型是针对孟加拉民间传说的。从技术上讲，这将是研究和分析孟加拉民间传说的孟加拉语自然语言处理的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在利用自然语言处理技术对孟加拉民间故事进行系统研究与分析，以更高效的方式保存和传播这一文化遗产。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉民间故事作为文化瑰宝面临传承挑战，需借助计算技术实现系统化研究与普及，同时推动孟加拉语NLP技术发展。
AI.method: 提出首个针对孟加拉民间故事的自然语言处理模型，结合文本分析与计算方法进行结构化研究。
AI.result: 构建了孟加拉民间故事的NLP处理框架，初步验证了其在文本分类、主题提取等任务中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为孟加拉民间故事的数字化保护与分析提供了技术路径，为后续文化计算研究奠定基础。

search_text: A Systematic Study and Analysis of Bengali Folklore with Natural Language Processing Systems 利用自然语言处理系统对孟加拉民俗进行系统研究与分析 Folklore, a solid branch of folk literature, is the hallmark of any nation or any society. Such as oral tradition; as proverbs or jokes, it also includes material culture as well as traditional folk beliefs, and various customs. Bengali folklore is as rich in-depth as it is amazing. Nevertheless, in the womb of time, it is determined to sustain its existence. Therefore, our aim in this study is to make our rich folklore more comprehensible to everyone in a more sophisticated computational way. Some studies concluded various aspects of the Bengali language with NLP. Our proposed model is to be specific for Bengali folklore. Technically, it will be the first step towards Bengali natural language processing for studying and analyzing the folklore of Bengal. 民间文学艺术是民间文学的一个重要分支，是任何民族、任何社会的标志。例如口头传统；作为谚语或笑话，它还包括物质文化以及传统的民间信仰和各种习俗。孟加拉的民间传说既丰富又深刻，令人惊叹。然而，在时间的子宫里，它决心维持它的存在。因此，我们这项研究的目的是通过更复杂的计算方式让每个人都更容易理解我们丰富的民间传说。一些研究通过 NLP 总结了孟加拉语的各个方面。我们提出的模型是针对孟加拉民间传说的。从技术上讲，这将是研究和分析孟加拉民间传说的孟加拉语自然语言处理的第一步。 本论文旨在利用自然语言处理技术对孟加拉民间故事进行系统研究与分析，以更高效的方式保存和传播这一文化遗产。 Mustain Billah,Md.
